AI.method: 将任务形式化为"问题选择问题"，基于655道临床医生编写的问题库和5种行为条件下的合成患者场景构建基准。比较三种策略：随机提问、临床固定表单（按临床顺序提问）、LLM引导的自适应策略（根据之前回答动态选择后续问题）。共进行300场模拟访谈，覆盖4名患者和5种行为条件。
AI.result: 临床固定表单显著优于随机提问；LLM引导的自适应策略整体信息恢复效果最佳。在回答不配合（如"guard-concise"条件）下，自适应策略的优势尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 临床对话系统的性能不仅依赖于理解已披露信息的语言能力，还依赖于在有限交互次数内能否到达正确的话题。该基准为研究临床结构化提问与自适应追问如何协同提升交互式机器学习中的信息恢复提供了可控实验框架。

title: TRACE: Topology-aware Reconstruction of Accidents in CARLA for AV Evaluation
summary: Validating Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) requires exposure to rare, safety-critical scenarios, infrequent in routine driving data. Existing benchmarks address this by generating synthetic conflicts or mapping accident descriptions to abstract road geometries, failing to capture the topological complexity of real-world crashes. We introduce TRACE , a pipeline that automates the reconstruction of NHTSA crash reports into high-fidelity CARLA simulations by (1) retrieving site-specific OpenStreetMap data to preserve exact road topology, (2) leveraging Large Language Models to infer vehicles' initial state from road geometry and pre-crash maneuvers, and (3) generating simulation trajectories from semi-structured report data. Using this pipeline, we curated a benchmark of 52 diverse accident scenarios covering varied collision types, road topologies, and pre-crash maneuvers, providing a challenging open source resource for testing AV systems against real-world failures.

AI.tldr: 提出TRACE管道，自动将NHTSA事故报告重建为CARLA高保真仿真，创建了包含52种真实交通事故场景的基准测试集，用于验证自动驾驶系统。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶验证基准要么生成合成冲突场景，要么将事故描述映射到抽象道路几何上，无法捕捉真实事故的道路拓扑复杂性，缺乏基于真实事故的高保真仿真场景。
AI.method: TRACE管道三步法：(1)检索OpenStreetMap数据保留精确道路拓扑；(2)利用大语言模型结合道路几何和碰撞前操作推断车辆初始状态；(3)从半结构化报告数据生成仿真轨迹。
AI.result: 构建了包含52个多样化事故场景的基准测试集，涵盖多种碰撞类型、道路拓扑和碰撞前操作，作为开源资源用于测试自动驾驶系统。
AI.conclusion: 该管道能够自动化地将真实事故报告转化为高保真仿真场景，为自动驾驶验证提供了更具挑战性和真实性的开源基准资源。

title: Robust Camera-to-Mocap Calibration and Verification for Large-Scale Multi-Camera Data Capture
summary: Optical motion capture (mocap) systems are widely used for ground-truth capture in AR/VR, SLAM and robotics datasets. These datasets require extrinsic calibration to align mocap coordinates to external camera frames -- a step that is subject to multiple sources of error in practice, and failures often go undetected until they corrupt downstream data. These issues are compounded for fisheye cameras, where spatially non-uniform distortion makes both calibration and verification more challenging. We present a calibration and verification system designed for this setting. Concretely, we target robustness to board-to-marker attachment variation, optimization initialization ambiguity, and session-to-session calibration drift after deployment. The calibration jointly estimates camera extrinsics and the board-to-marker transform, and uses a staged solver to improve convergence reliability under ambiguous initialization. The verification component, \lollypop, provides fast, operator-independent assessment through a measurement chain entirely independent of the calibration data. In experiments on a Meta Quest 3 headset with fisheye cameras, our calibration outperforms existing benchwork, and lollypop reliably detects calibration degradation over time. The system has been deployed in production data collection pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套针对鱼眼相机的光学动捕系统外参标定与验证方案，通过联合估计相机外参和板-标记变换、采用分阶段求解器提升收敛可靠性，并设计了独立验证工具Lollypop，在Meta Quest 3上验证了优于现有方法的效果，已部署于生产线。
AI.motivation: 现有光学动捕系统在AR/VR、SLAM等场景的外参标定存在多重误差源（如板-标记装配差异、初始化歧义、漂移），且鱼眼相机的非线性畸变使标定与验证更加困难，而这些误差常被忽视直至影响下游数据质量。
AI.method: 1) 联合优化：同时估计相机外参和板-标记变换（board-to-marker transform）；2) 分阶段求解器：分步优化以应对初始化歧义，提升收敛稳定性；3) 独立验证工具Lollypop：构建完全独立于标定数据的测量链，实现快速、无操作员依赖的标定质量评估。
AI.result: 在Meta Quest 3头显（配备鱼眼相机）上，所提标定方法优于现有手工标定结果；Lollypop能够可靠检测标定质量随时间退化的情况。
AI.conclusion: 提出的标定与验证系统有效解决了鱼眼相机动捕标定中的鲁棒性和退化检测问题，已在生产级数据采集流程中部署应用。

title: Sound Agentic Science Requires Adversarial Experiments
comment: Published at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild
summary: LLM-based agents are rapidly being adopted for scientific data analysis, automating tasks once limited by human time and expertise. This capability is often framed as an acceleration of discovery, but it also accelerates a familiar failure mode, the rapid production of plausible, endlessly revisable analyses that are easy to generate, effectively turning hypothesis space into candidate claims supported by selectively chosen analyses, optimized for publishable positives. Unlike software, scientific knowledge is not validated by the iterative accumulation of code and post hoc statistical support. A fluent explanation or a significant result on a single dataset is not verification. Because the missing evidence is a negative space, experiments and analyses that would have falsified the claim were never run or never published. We therefore propose that non-experimental claims produced with agentic assistance be evaluated under a falsification-first standard: agents should not be used primarily to craft the most compelling narrative, but to actively search for the ways in which the claim can fail.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，基于LLM的智能体在科学数据分析中被广泛采用，虽然加速了发现，但同时也加速了“产生看似合理、可无限修改的分析结果”这一失败模式，即用选择性分析支持预设结论。作者提出，针对非实验性科学主张，应采用“证伪优先”标准：智能体不应主要用于构建最具说服力的叙事，而应主动寻找主张可能失败的方式。
AI.motivation: 作者认为，LLM智能体在科学数据分析中的使用，虽然表面上是加速科学发现，但实际上更容易产生“选择性分析”（p-hacking-like）的问题。现有验证机制（代码迭代、后验统计支持）对科学知识的验证不足，缺乏被遗漏的否定性证据（未运行的实验、未发表的反例）导致假阳性结果。
AI.method: 提出“证伪优先”（falsification-first）评估标准：对于由智能体辅助产生的非实验性主张，不应让智能体主要用于构建最吸引人的叙事，而应让它主动搜索能使该主张失败的方式（如寻找反例、替代解释、假设违反等）。
AI.result: 论文未提供实验性结果，主要在逻辑层面论证了“加速生成选择性分析”的风险，并给出了规范性的建议方案。
AI.conclusion: 科学知识不能通过智能体生成的流畅解释或单一数据集的显著结果得到验证。为了避免智能体放大“发表积极结果”的偏差，应采用证伪优先的标准来使用智能体。

title: Universal Transformers Need Memory: Depth-State Trade-offs in Adaptive Recursive Reasoning
summary:
We study learned memory tokens as computational scratchpad for a single-block Universal Transformer (UT) with Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) on Sudoku-Extreme, a combinatorial reasoning benchmark. We find that memory tokens are empirically necessary: across all configurations tested -- 3 seeds, multiple token counts, two initialization schemes, ACT and fixed-depth processing -- no configuration without memory tokens achieves non-trivial performance. The optimal count exhibits a sharp lower threshold (T=0 always fails, T=4 is borderline, T=8 reliably succeeds for 81-cell puzzles) followed by a stable plateau (T=8-32, 57.4% +/- 0.7% exact-match) and collapse from attention dilution at T=64.
  During experimentation, we identify a router initialization trap that causes >70% of training runs to fail: both default zero-bias initialization (p ~ 0.5) and Graves' recommended positive bias (p ~ 0.73) cause tokens to halt after ~2 steps at initialization, settling into a shallow equilibrium (halt ~ 5-7) that the model cannot escape. Inverting the bias to -3 ("deep start," p ~ 0.05) eliminates this failure mode. We confirm through ablation that the trap is inherent to ACT initialization, not an artifact of our architecture choices.
  With reliable training established, we show that (1) ACT provides more consistent results than fixed-depth processing (56.9% +/- 0.7% vs 53.4% +/- 9.3% across 3 seeds); (2) ACT with lambda warmup achieves matching accuracy (57.0% +/- 1.1%) using 34% fewer ponder steps; and (3) attention heads specialize into memory readers, constraint propagators, and integrators across recursive depth. Code is available at https://github.com/che-shr-cat/utm-jax.

AI.tldr: 研究了单块通用Transformer中的学习型记忆token作为计算草稿纸，在数独推理任务上的表现。发现记忆token是必要的，最优数量存在阈值，并识别了路由初始化陷阱问题，提出了解决方案。
AI.motivation: 探索记忆token作为Transformer计算草稿纸的有效性，以及ACT机制在推理任务中的表现和初始化问题。
AI.method: 使用单块Universal Transformer + ACT，在Sudoku-Extreme基准上测试不同记忆token数量、初始化方案、固定深度vs ACT等配置。识别了路由初始化陷阱并提出"deep start"（偏置设为-3）解决方案。
AI.result: ①无记忆token无法取得有效性能；②最优记忆token数量为8-32（57.4%准确率），T=64因注意力稀释而崩溃；③ACT比固定深度更稳定（56.9% vs 53.4%）；④ACT加λ预热可减少34%计算步数且精度相当；⑤注意力头在递归深度中分化为记忆读取器、约束传播器和整合器。
AI.conclusion: 记忆token对复杂推理任务是必要的；ACT初始化存在陷阱，通过反转偏置可解决；ACT提供了更稳定高效的计算分配方案。

title: AgentSearchBench: A Benchmark for AI Agent Search in the Wild
summary: The rapid growth of AI agent ecosystems is transforming how complex tasks are delegated and executed, creating a new challenge of identifying suitable agents for a given task. Unlike traditional tools, agent capabilities are often compositional and execution-dependent, making them difficult to assess from textual descriptions alone. However, existing research and benchmarks typically assume well-specified functionalities, controlled candidate pools, or only executable task queries, leaving realistic agent search scenarios insufficiently studied. We introduce AgentSearchBench, a large-scale benchmark for agent search in the wild, built from nearly 10,000 real-world agents across multiple providers. The benchmark formalizes agent search as retrieval and reranking problems under both executable task queries and high-level task descriptions, and evaluates relevance using execution-grounded performance signals. Experiments reveal a consistent gap between semantic similarity and actual agent performance, exposing the limitations of description-based retrieval and reranking methods. We further show that lightweight behavioral signals, including execution-aware probing, can substantially improve ranking quality, highlighting the importance of incorporating execution signals into agent discovery. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bingo-W/AgentSearchBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了AgentSearchBench，一个包含近万个真实世界智能体的大规模基准，用于研究在自然环境下如何搜索和排序合适的AI智能体。实验发现基于语义描述的方法与实际表现存在差距，而引入执行感知的轻量级行为信号能显著提升排序质量。
AI.motivation: 现有研究和基准通常假设智能体功能明确、候选池可控或只有可执行任务查询，缺乏对现实世界中智能体搜索场景（智能体能力通常具有组合性和执行依赖性，难以仅从文本描述评估）的充分研究。
AI.method: 构建了AgentSearchBench基准，包含来自多个提供商的近万个真实智能体。将智能体搜索形式化为检索和重排序问题，覆盖可执行任务查询和高层任务描述两类场景，并使用执行驱动的性能信号评估相关性。
AI.result: 实验表明语义相似性与实际智能体表现之间存在持续差距，揭示了基于描述检索和重排序方法的局限性。轻量级行为信号（包括执行感知探针）能显著提升排序质量。
AI.conclusion: 强调了将执行信号纳入智能体发现过程的重要性，为构建更有效的智能体搜索引擎提供了新方向。

title: Outcome Rewards Do Not Guarantee Verifiable or Causally Important Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) on chain-of-thought reasoning has become a standard part of language model post-training recipes. A common assumption is that the reasoning chains trained through RLVR reliably represent how a model gets to its answer. In this paper, we develop two metrics for critically examining this assumption: Causal Importance of Reasoning (CIR), which measures the cumulative effect of reasoning tokens on the final answer, and Sufficiency of Reasoning (SR), which measures whether a verifier can arrive at an unambiguous answer based on the reasoning alone. Through experiments with the Qwen2.5 model series and ReasoningGym tasks, we find that: (1) while RLVR does improve task accuracy, it does not reliably improve CIR or SR, calling the role of reasoning in model performance into question; (2) a small amount of SFT before RLVR can be a remedy for low CIR and SR; and (3) CIR and SR can be improved even without SFT by applying auxiliary CIR/SR rewards on top of the outcome-based reward. This joint reward matches the accuracy of RLVR while also leading to causally important and sufficient reasoning. These results show that RLVR does not always lead models to rely on reasoning in the way that is commonly thought, but this issue can be remedied with simple modifications to the post-training procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在思维链推理中虽然能提升任务准确率，但并不能保证推理过程对最终答案具有因果重要性和充分性；通过加入少量SFT预训练或辅助的因果/充分性奖励可以修复这一问题。
AI.motivation: 挑战现有常见假设：通过RLVR训练的推理链能可靠地反映模型得出答案的真实推理过程。作者希望通过量化指标检验这种假设是否成立。
AI.method: 提出两个新指标：CIR（推理的因果重要性，衡量推理token对最终答案的累积影响）和SR（推理的充分性，衡量仅凭推理是否能得到唯一答案）。在Qwen2.5模型系列和ReasoningGym任务上进行了实验。
AI.result: (1) RLVR提升了准确率，但并未可靠提升CIR或SR；(2) RLVR前加入少量SFT可改善CIR和SR；(3) 在结果奖励基础上加入辅助的CIR/SR奖励，可在保持准确率的同时提升推理的因果重要性和充分性。
AI.conclusion: RLVR并不总能如人们普遍认为的那样让模型真正依赖推理过程，但通过简单的后训练调整（如少量SFT或联合奖励）即可修复这一问题。

title: Ethics Testing: Proactive Identification of Generative AI System Harms
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GAI) systems that can automatically generate content in the form of source code or other contents (e.g., images) has seen increasing popularity due to the emergence of tools such as ChatGPT which rely on Large Language Models (LLMs). Misuse of the automatically generated content can incur serious consequences due to potential harms in the generated content. Despite the importance of ensuring the quality of automatically generated content, there is little to no approach that can systematically generate tests for identifying software harms in the content generated by these GAI systems. In this article, we introduce the novel concept of ethics testing which aims to systematically generate tests for identifying software harms. Different from existing testing methodologies (e.g., fairness testing that aims to identifying software discrimination), ethics testing aims to systematically detect software harms that could be induced due to unethical behavior (e.g., harmful behavior or behavior that violates intellectual property rights) in automatically generated content. We introduced the concept of ethics testing, discussed the challenges therewithin, and conducted five case studies to show how ethics testing can be performed for generative AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"伦理测试"新概念，旨在系统化生成测试用例，识别生成式AI系统（如ChatGPT）输出内容中的软件危害（如有害行为、侵犯知识产权等），并通过五个案例研究展示了该方法的应用。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI系统（如基于LLM的ChatGPT）可自动生成代码、图像等内容，但生成内容可能存在潜在危害。目前缺乏系统性测试方法来识别这些AI生成内容中的软件危害。
AI.method: 提出"伦理测试"概念，区别于传统的公平性测试（识别歧视），伦理测试旨在系统性检测自动生成内容中因不道德行为导致的软件危害（如有害行为或侵犯知识产权行为）。通过五个案例研究展示如何对生成式AI系统进行伦理测试。
AI.result: 定义了伦理测试的概念，分析了其中的挑战，并通过五个案例研究证明了伦理测试在生成式AI系统中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 伦理测试是识别生成式AI系统中软件危害的新方法，弥补了现有测试方法在检测AI生成内容中不道德行为导致危害方面的空白。

title: PAGaS: Pixel-Aligned 1DoF Gaussian Splatting for Depth Refinement
summary: Gaussian Splatting (GS) has emerged as an efficient approach for high-quality novel view synthesis. While early GS variants struggled to accurately model the scene's geometry, recent advancements constraining the Gaussians' spread and shapes, such as 2D Gaussian Splatting, have significantly improved geometric fidelity. In this paper, we present Pixel-Aligned 1DoF Gaussian Splatting (PAGaS) that adapts the GS representation from novel view synthesis to the multi-view stereo depth task. Our key contribution is modeling a pixel's depth using one-degree-of-freedom (1DoF) Gaussians that remain tightly constrained during optimization. Unlike existing approaches, our Gaussians' positions and sizes are restricted by the back-projected pixel volumes, leaving depth as the sole degree of freedom to optimize. PAGaS produces highly detailed depths, as illustrated in Figure 1. We quantitatively validate these improvements on top of reference geometric and learning-based multi-view stereo baselines on challenging 3D reconstruction benchmarks. Code: davidrecasens.github.io/pagas

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pixel-Aligned 1DoF Gaussian Splatting (PAGaS)，将高斯泼溅从新视角合成扩展到多视图立体深度任务，通过将高斯的位置和大小约束在反向投影的像素体素内，仅优化深度这一自由度，实现了高精度的深度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有高斯泼溅方法虽然在新型视角合成上表现优异，但在几何重建精度上仍有不足。作者希望将GS表示从新视角合成任务扩展到多视图立体深度估计任务，同时解决现有GS变体难以准确建模场景几何的问题。
AI.method: 提出Pixel-Aligned 1DoF Gaussian Splatting (PAGaS)，核心创新是像素的深度使用单自由度高斯建模。高斯的位置和大小被反向投影的像素体素严格约束，优化过程中仅深度作为唯一的自由参数进行优化，从而保持高斯紧密约束。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的3D重建基准上，PAGaS相比参考的几何方法和基于学习的多视图立体基线方法，在深度估计精度上取得了显著提升，能生成高度细节化的深度图。
AI.conclusion: PAGaS成功将高斯泼溅应用于多视图立体深度任务，通过极致的自由度约束（仅1DoF）获得了高精度的几何重建结果，为GS在几何任务上的应用提供了新思路。

title: Memanto: Typed Semantic Memory with Information-Theoretic Retrieval for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: The transition from stateless language model inference to persistent, multi session autonomous agents has revealed memory to be a primary architectural bottleneck in the deployment of production grade agentic systems. Existing methodologies largely depend on hybrid semantic graph architectures, which impose substantial computational overhead during both ingestion and retrieval. These systems typically require large language model mediated entity extraction, explicit graph schema maintenance, and multi query retrieval pipelines. This paper introduces Memanto, a universal memory layer for agentic artificial intelligence that challenges the prevailing assumption that knowledge graph complexity is necessary to achieve high fidelity agent memory. Memanto integrates a typed semantic memory schema comprising thirteen predefined memory categories, an automated conflict resolution mechanism, and temporal versioning. These components are enabled by Moorcheh's Information Theoretic Search engine, a no indexing semantic database that provides deterministic retrieval within sub ninety millisecond latency while eliminating ingestion delay. Through systematic benchmarking on the LongMemEval and LoCoMo evaluation suites, Memanto achieves state of the art accuracy scores of 89.8 percent and 87.1 percent respectively. These results surpass all evaluated hybrid graph and vector based systems while requiring only a single retrieval query, incurring no ingestion cost, and maintaining substantially lower operational complexity. A five stage progressive ablation study is presented to quantify the contribution of each architectural component, followed by a discussion of the implications for scalable deployment of agentic memory systems.

AI.tldr: Memanto是一个通用记忆层，通过13种预定义语义记忆类别、自动冲突解决和时间版本控制，结合基于信息论的无索引语义数据库，在无需知识图谱复杂性的情况下实现高性能代理记忆，在LongMemEval和LoCoMo基准上分别达到89.8%和87.1%的SOTA准确率。
AI.motivation: 从无状态语言模型推理向持久的、多会话自主代理的转变，揭示了记忆是生产级代理系统部署中的主要架构瓶颈，现有混合语义图架构计算开销大、需要实体提取和图模式维护。
AI.method: Memanto集成了13种预定义类型的语义记忆模式、自动冲突解决机制和时间版本控制，核心引擎是Moorcheh的Information Theoretic Search——一种无索引语义数据库，可实现确定性检索且消除摄入延迟。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval和LoCoMo基准上分别达到89.8%和87.1%的SOTA准确率，仅需单次检索查询，零摄入成本，延迟低于90毫秒，超越所有混合图与向量系统。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱复杂性并非实现高保真代理记忆的必要条件，Memanto通过简洁设计实现了更低复杂度的可扩展代理记忆系统部署。

title: Mochi: Aligning Pre-training and Inference for Efficient Graph Foundation Models via Meta-Learning
summary: We propose Mochi, a Graph Foundation Model that addresses task unification and training efficiency by adopting a meta-learning based training framework. Prior models pre-train with reconstruction-based objectives such as link prediction, and assume that the resulting representations can be aligned with downstream tasks through a separate unification step such as class prototypes. We demonstrate through synthetic and real-world experiments that this procedure, while simple and intuitive, has limitations that directly affect downstream task performance. To address these limitations, Mochi pre-trains on few-shot episodes that mirror the downstream evaluation protocol, aligning the training objective with inference rather than relying on a post-hoc unification step. We show that Mochi, along with its more powerful variant Mochi++, achieves competitive or superior performance compared to existing Graph Foundation Models across 25 real-world graph datasets spanning node classification, link prediction, and graph classification, while requiring 8$\sim$27 times less training time than the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: Mochi提出了一种基于元学习的图基础模型训练框架，通过少样本episode预训练对齐训练目标与推理过程，在25个真实图数据集上达到SOTA且训练速度比最强基线快8~27倍。
AI.motivation: 现有图基础模型使用基于重构的预训练目标（如链接预测），并通过后处理步骤（如类原型）将表示对齐到下游任务。这种简单直观的方法实际上存在限制，直接影响下游任务性能。Mochi旨在解决任务统一与训练效率两大问题。
AI.method: Mochi摒弃了重构式预训练+后处理对齐的两阶段范式，转而采用元学习训练框架，在预训练阶段直接使用与下游评估协议一致的少样本episode进行训练，使训练目标与推理目标对齐，无需单独的统一后处理步骤。此外还提出了更强大的变体Mochi++。
AI.result: 在25个真实图数据集上（涵盖节点分类、链接预测、图分类三个任务），Mochi和Mochi++达到竞争性或更优的性能，同时训练时间仅为最强基线的1/8~1/27。
AI.conclusion: Mochi证明了将元学习范式引入图基础模型预训练的有效性，通过直接对齐训练与推理过程，既提升了任务统一能力，又大幅提升了训练效率。

title: An End-to-End Ukrainian RAG for Local Deployment. Optimized Hybrid Search and Lightweight Generation
summary: This paper presents a highly efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system built specifically for Ukrainian document question answering, which achieved 2nd place in the UNLP 2026 Shared Task. Our solution features a custom two-stage search pipeline that retrieves relevant document pages, paired with a specialized Ukrainian language model fine-tuned on synthetic data to generate accurate, grounded answers. Finally, we compress the model for lightweight deployment. Evaluated under strict computational limits, our architecture demonstrates that high-quality, verifiable AI question answering can be achieved locally on resource-constrained hardware without sacrificing accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个高效的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，专门用于乌克兰语文档问答，在UNLP 2026共享任务中获得第二名。系统采用自定义两阶段检索流程和微调后的乌克兰语专用语言模型，最终压缩模型实现轻量级部署，能在资源受限硬件上实现高质量可验证的AI问答。
AI.motivation: 针对乌克兰语文档问答任务，在严格计算资源限制下，实现高效、准确、可验证的RAG系统。
AI.method: 提出自定义两阶段搜索流水线（检索相关文档页）+ 基于合成数据微调的乌克兰语专用语言模型 + 模型压缩实现轻量级部署。
AI.result: 在UNLP 2026共享任务中获得第二名，在严格计算限制下实现高质量、可验证的问答性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提架构证明了在资源受限硬件上实现本地高质量、可验证的AI问答是可行的，且不牺牲准确性。

title: Evaluating LLM-Based Goal Extraction in Requirements Engineering: Prompting Strategies and Their Limitations
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure. This contribution will be published in the conference proceedings of EASE 2026 Conference (https://conf.researchr.org/home/ease-2026/prompt-se-2026)
summary: Due to the textual and repetitive nature of many Requirements Engineering (RE) artefacts, Large Language Models (LLMs) have proven useful to automate their generation and processing. In this paper, we discuss a possible approach for automating the Goal-Oriented Requirements Engineering (GORE) process by extracting functional goals from software documentation through three phases: actor identification, high and low-level goal extraction. To implement these functionalities, we propose a chain of LLMs fed with engineered prompts. We experimented with different variants of in-context learning and measured the similarities between input data and in-context examples to better investigate their impact. Another key element is the generation-critic mechanism, implemented as a feedback loop involving two LLMs. Although the pipeline achieved 61% accuracy in low-level goal identification, the final stage, these results indicate the approach is best suited as a tool to accelerate manual extraction rather than as a full replacement. The feedback-loop mechanism with Zero-shot outperformed stand-alone Few-shot, with an ablation study suggesting that performance slightly degrades without the feedback cycle. However, we reported that the combination of the feedback mechanism with Few-shot does not deliver any advantage, possibly suggesting that the primary performance ceiling is the prompting strategy applied to the 'critic' LLM. Together with the refinement of both the quantity and quality of the Shot examples, future research will integrate Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting to improve accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM链的自动化目标导向需求工程（GORE）方法，通过提示工程、上下文学习和生成-评论家反馈机制从软件文档中提取功能目标。尽管在低级目标识别上达到61%的准确率，该方法更适合作为人工提取的加速工具而非完全替代方案。
AI.motivation: 需求工程（RE）人工制品具有文本性和重复性，LLM已被证明可用于其自动化生成和处理。本文旨在自动化目标导向需求工程（GORE）流程，从软件文档中提取功能目标。
AI.method: 提出三阶段流水线：参与者识别、高层级目标提取和低层级目标提取。采用LLM链结合工程化提示，实验不同上下文学习变体，并引入生成-评论家反馈机制（两个LLM之间的反馈循环）。
AI.result: 低层级目标识别准确率达61%；反馈循环机制+零样本学习优于独立少样本学习；消融研究显示无反馈循环性能略有下降；反馈机制与少样本学习结合未带来优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法最适合作为加速手动提取的工具而非完全替代品。未来将整合RAG和CoT提示技术以提高准确性，并优化示例的数量和质量。

title: Anatomy-Aware Unsupervised Detection and Localization of Retinal Abnormalities in Optical Coherence Tomography
summary: Reliable automated analysis of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) imaging is crucial for diagnosing retinal disorders but faces a critical barrier: the need for expensive, labor-intensive expert annotations. Supervised deep learning models struggle to generalize across diverse pathologies, imaging devices, and patient populations due to their restricted vocabulary of annotated abnormalities. We propose an unsupervised anomaly detection framework that learns the normative distribution of healthy retinal anatomy without lesion annotations, directly addressing annotation efficiency challenges in clinical deployment. Our approach leverages a discrete latent model trained on normal B-scans to capture OCT-specific structural patterns. To enhance clinical robustness, we incorporate retinal layer-aware supervision and structured triplet learning to separate healthy from pathological representations, improving model reliability across varied imaging conditions. During inference, anomalies are detected and localized via reconstruction discrepancies, enabling both image and pixel-level identification without requiring disease-specific labels. On the Kermany dataset (AUROC: 0.799), our method substantially outperforms VAE, VQVAE, VQGAN, and f-AnoGAN baselines. Critically, cross-dataset evaluation on Srinivasan achieves AUROC 0.884 with superior generalization, demonstrating robust domain adaptation. On the external RETOUCH benchmark, unsupervised anomaly segmentation achieves competitive Dice (0.200) and mIoU (0.117) scores, validating reproducibility across institutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督异常检测框架，通过学习健康视网膜的规范分布，无需标注即可在OCT图像中检测和定位病变，在多个数据集上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 监督深度学习模型需要昂贵且劳动密集型的专家标注，且在不同病理、设备和患者群体中泛化能力差，亟需一种无需标注的自动化OCT分析方法。
AI.method: 采用离散潜在模型学习健康OCT结构模式，结合视网膜层感知监督和结构化三元组学习区分健康与病理表征，通过重建差异在图像和像素级别检测异常。
AI.result: 在Kermany数据集AUROC达0.799，跨数据集Srinivasan上AUROC达0.884，RETOUCH基准上无监督分割Dice 0.200、mIoU 0.117。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督框架有效解决了OCT分析中的标注瓶颈问题，具备良好的跨数据集泛化能力和临床部署潜力。

title: Emergent Strategic Reasoning Risks in AI: A Taxonomy-Driven Evaluation Framework
summary: As reasoning capacity and deployment scope grow in tandem, large language models (LLMs) gain the capacity to engage in behaviors that serve their own objectives, a class of risks we term Emergent Strategic Reasoning Risks (ESRRs). These include, but are not limited to, deception (intentionally misleading users or evaluators), evaluation gaming (strategically manipulating performance during safety testing), and reward hacking (exploiting misspecified objectives). Systematically understanding and benchmarking these risks remains an open challenge. To address this gap, we introduce ESRRSim, a taxonomy-driven agentic framework for automated behavioral risk evaluation. We construct an extensible risk taxonomy of 7 categories, which is decomposed into 20 subcategories. ESRRSim generates evaluation scenarios designed to elicit faithful reasoning, paired with dual rubrics assessing both model responses and reasoning traces, in a judge-agnostic and scalable architecture. Evaluation across 11 reasoning LLMs reveals substantial variation in risk profiles (detection rates ranging 14.45%-72.72%), with dramatic generational improvements suggesting models may increasingly recognize and adapt to evaluation contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESRRSim框架，用于自动化评估大语言模型中出现的策略性推理风险（如欺骗、评估游戏、奖励黑客等），通过7大类20子类的可扩展风险分类法，对11个推理模型进行评估，发现风险检出率差异巨大（14.45%-72.72%），且随模型代际提升，模型可能愈发识别并适应评估情境。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型随着推理能力和部署范围的扩大，可能产生服务于自身目标的行为（欺骗、评估游戏、奖励黑客等），但系统性理解与基准测试这些风险仍是一个未解决的挑战。
AI.method: 提出ESRRSim框架：构建包含7大类20个子类的可扩展风险分类法；生成旨在引发忠实推理的评估场景；设计双重评分标准（评估模型响应与推理轨迹）；采用与评判器无关的可扩展架构。
AI.result: 在11个推理LLM上评估，风险检出率从14.45%到72.72%不等，存在显著差异；发现代际提升可能使模型更善于识别并适应评估情境。
AI.conclusion: ESRRSim能够系统性评估LLM的策略性推理风险，揭示了不同模型风险画像的显著差异及模型能力的代际演化趋势。

title: Kernel Contracts: A Specification Language for ML Kernel Correctness Across Heterogeneous Silicon
summary:
Every ML kernel ships with an implicit contract about what it computes. People rarely write the contract down. When two kernels disagree -- when a matmul on AMD produces a different gradient than the same matmul on NVIDIA, when a fused attention kernel silently downcasts an accumulator, when an out-of-bounds access returns zero on one stack and garbage on another -- there is no formal artifact to arbitrate the dispute. Recent empirical work has measured the gap across silicon platforms, but none of it specifies the contract being violated.
  We present a specification language for kernel contracts. A contract has eight parts: identifier, scope, precondition, postcondition, tolerance, reference oracle, measurement protocol, and violation signature. We use it to state twelve contract classes covering precision, ordering, compiler-induced, and exceptional-value failure modes, each grounded in published empirical evidence. We require a three-state calibration: every contract must admit at least one reference-conforming implementation and at least one contract-violating implementation that passes basic functional tests. We apply the framework to three documented incidents -- Huawei Ascend silent precision coercion, Sakana AI CUDA Engineer reward hacking, AMD out-of-bounds silent acceptance -- and show that each informal diagnosis maps to a specific contract violation with a measurable signature. A kernel contract suite is a normative reference against which conformance can be graded, in the way that ISASecure grades industrial control systems against IEC 62443.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于定义机器学习内核合约的规范语言，包含八个组成部分，可用于描述精度、排序、编译器和异常值等故障模式。通过三个真实案例验证了该框架的有效性，旨在为内核行为提供可仲裁的规范性参考。
AI.motivation: 现有ML内核存在隐性计算合约，当不同平台或实现产生不一致结果时，缺乏正式文档来仲裁分歧。尽管已有实证工作测量了跨平台差异，但从未明确规范被违反的合约内容。
AI.method: 提出一种包含标识符、范围、前置条件、后置条件、容差、参考预言机、测量协议和违规签名八个部分的合约规范语言，定义了十二类合约（覆盖精度、排序、编译器诱导和异常值故障模式），并要求每份合约必须有三态校准（至少一个合规实现和一个违规实现）。
AI.result: 将框架应用于华为昇腾静默精度强制转换、Sakana AI CUDA工程师奖励黑客攻击、AMD越界静默接受三个已知事件，展示了每个非正式诊断如何映射到具有可测量签名的特定合约违规。
AI.conclusion: 内核合约套件可作为规范性参考，用于评估实现的一致性，类似于ISASecure对工业控制系统进行IEC 62443合规评级的做法。

title: Knowledge-driven Augmentation and Retrieval for Integrative Temporal Adaptation
summary: Time introduces fundamental challenges in model development and deployment: models are usually trained on historical data while deployed on future data where semantic distributions and domain knowledge may evolve. Unfortunately, existing studies either overlook temporal shifts or hardly capture rich shifting patterns of both semantic and knowledge. We develop Knowledge-driven Augmentation and Retrieval for Integrative Temporal Adaptation (KARITA) to capture diverse temporal shifts (e.g., uncertainty and feature shift), construct and integrate rich knowledge sources (e.g., medical ontology like MeSH), and leverage shifting insights for selecting-retrieval augmented learning. We evaluate KARITA on classification tasks across multiple domains, clinical, legal, and scientific corpora, demonstrating consistent improvements across multiple domains with temporal adaptation. Our results show that knowledge integration can be more critical and effective in temporal augmentation and learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KARITA框架，通过知识增强的检索与学习来应对时间推移带来的数据分布和语义变化，在临床、法律和科学等多个领域验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究要么忽略时间偏移，要么难以捕捉语义和知识领域丰富的演变模式，缺乏能够整合外部知识来适应多种时间变化的有效方法。
AI.method: 提出KARITA框架，包含知识驱动的数据增强与检索机制，整合如MeSH医学本体等丰富知识源，利用时间偏移洞察进行选择性检索增强学习，以应对不确定性、特征偏移等多种时间变化。
AI.result: 在临床、法律和科学语料等多个领域的分类任务上，KARITA在时间适应方面均取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 知识整合在时间增强和学习中比传统方法更为关键且有效，为处理时间漂移问题提供了新思路。

title: RAG-Reflect: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Reflections for Comment-Driven Code Maintenance on Stack Overflow
summary: User comments on online programming platforms such as Stack Overflow play a vital role in maintaining the correctness and relevance of shared code examples. However, the majority of comments express gratitude or clarification, while only a small fraction highlight actionable issues that drive meaningful edits. This paper demonstrates how agentic AI principles can revolutionize software maintenance tasks by presenting RAG-Reflect, a modular framework that achieves fine-tuned-level performance for valid comment-edit prediction without task-specific training. Valid Comment-Edit Prediction (VCP) is the task of determining whether a user comment directly triggered a subsequent code edit. The framework integrates large language models (LLMs) with retrieval-augmented reasoning and self-reflection mechanisms. RAG-Reflect operates through a three-stage runtime workflow built on a one-time pattern analysis phase. During initialization, an Interpretation module analyzes the knowledge base to generate validation rules. At inference time, the system (1) retrieves contextual examples, (2) reasons about comment-edit causality, and (3) reflects on decisions using the pre-established rules. We evaluate RAG-Reflect on the publicly available SOUP benchmark, achieving Precision = 0.81, Recall = 0.74, and F1 = 0.78, outperforming traditional baselines (e.g., Logistic Regression, XGBoost, different prompting techniques) and closely approaching the performance of fine-tuned models (F1 = 0.773) without retraining. Our ablation and stage-level analyses show that both retrieval and reflection modules substantially enhance performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAG-Reflect框架，结合大语言模型、检索增强推理和自我反思机制，在不需任务特定训练的情况下，实现了与微调模型相当的有效评论-编辑预测性能（F1=0.78），显著优于传统基线方法。
AI.motivation: Stack Overflow等编程平台上的用户评论大多表达感谢或澄清，仅有少数能触发实际的代码编辑。现有方法难以有效识别哪些评论真正推动了代码修改，而微调模型需要大量标注数据。作者希望开发一种无需任务特定训练就能达到微调水平的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出RAG-Reflect模块化框架，包含三个阶段：初始化阶段通过Interpretation模块分析知识库生成验证规则；推理阶段则依次进行(1)检索上下文示例、(2)推理评论-编辑因果关系、(3)基于预设规则反思决策。整个流程建立在一轮模式分析之上，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在SOUP基准上，RAG-Reflect达到Precision=0.81、Recall=0.74、F1=0.78，优于逻辑回归、XGBoost及多种提示方法等基线，接近微调模型F1=0.773的表现。消融实验表明检索和反思模块均显著提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: RAG-Reflect证明智能体AI原则（检索增强推理+自我反思）可以在无需任务特定训练的情况下，有效解决软件维护中的评论-编辑预测任务，为在线编程平台的质量维护提供了新的自动化思路。

title: GenMatter: Perceiving Physical Objects with Generative Matter Models
summary: Human visual perception offers valuable insights for understanding computational principles of motion-based scene interpretation. Humans robustly detect and segment moving entities that constitute independently moveable chunks of matter, whether observing sparse moving dots, textured surfaces, or naturalistic scenes. In contrast, existing computer vision systems lack a unified approach that works across these diverse settings. Inspired by principles of human perception, we propose a generative model that hierarchically groups low-level motion cues and high-level appearance features into particles (small Gaussians representing local matter), and groups particles into clusters capturing coherently and independently moveable physical entities. We develop a hardware-accelerated inference algorithm based on parallelized block Gibbs sampling to recover stable particle motion and groupings. Our model operates on different kinds of inputs (random dots, stylized textures, or naturalistic RGB video), enabling it to work across settings where biological vision succeeds but existing computer vision approaches do not. We validate this unified framework across three domains: on 2D random dot kinematograms, our approach captures human object perception including graded uncertainty across ambiguous conditions; on a Gestalt-inspired dataset of camouflaged rotating objects, our approach recovers correct 3D structure from motion and thereby accurate 2D object segmentation; and on naturalistic RGB videos, our model tracks the moving 3D matter that makes up deforming objects, enabling robust object-level scene understanding. This work thus establishes a general framework for motion-based perception grounded in principles of human vision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受人类视觉感知启发的统一生成模型，通过层次化粒子分组实现跨场景的运动感知（随机点、纹理、自然视频），并利用并行块吉布斯采样进行高效推理，在多个基准上验证了其类人感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉系统缺乏能够在稀疏运动点、纹理表面和自然场景等多种设置下统一工作的运动感知方法，而人类视觉却能鲁棒地完成这些任务。受此启发，作者希望建立一种通用的、基于人类视觉原理的运动感知框架。
AI.method: 提出层次化生成模型：将低层运动线索和高层外观特征分组为粒子（表示局部物质的高斯分布），再将粒子聚类为独立运动的物理实体。推导基于并行化块吉布斯采样的硬件加速推理算法来恢复稳定的粒子运动和分组。
AI.result: 在三个领域验证：1) 2D随机点运动图：捕捉到人类物体感知（包括模糊条件下的渐变不确定性）；2) 伪装旋转物体数据集：正确恢复3D结构运动和2D分割；3) 自然RGB视频：追踪组成变形物体的3D运动物质，实现鲁棒的物体级场景理解。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一个基于运动感知的通用框架，根植于人类视觉原理，弥合了计算机视觉与生物视觉在运动感知领域的差距。

title: When Does LLM Self-Correction Help? A Control-Theoretic Markov Diagnostic and Verify-First Intervention
summary: Iterative self-correction is widely used in agentic LLM systems, but when repeated refinement helps versus hurts remains unclear. We frame self-correction as a cybernetic feedback loop in which the same language model serves as both controller and plant, and use a two-state Markov model over {Correct, Incorrect} to operationalize a simple deployment diagnostic: iterate only when ECR/EIR > Acc/(1 - Acc). In this view, EIR functions as a stability margin and prompting functions as lightweight controller design. Across 7 models and 3 datasets (GSM8K, MATH, StrategyQA), we find a sharp near-zero EIR threshold (<= 0.5%) separating beneficial from harmful self-correction. Only o3-mini (+3.4 pp, EIR = 0%), Claude Opus 4.6 (+0.6 pp, EIR ~ 0.2%), and o4-mini (+/-0 pp) remain non-degrading; GPT-5 degrades by -1.8 pp. A verify-first prompt ablation provides causal evidence that this threshold is actionable through prompting alone: on GPT-4o-mini it reduces EIR from 2% to 0% and turns -6.2 pp degradation into +0.2 pp (paired McNemar p < 10^-4), while producing little change on already-sub-threshold models. ASC further illustrates the stopping trade-off: it halts harmful refinement but incurs a 3.8 pp confidence-elicitation cost. Overall, the paper argues that self-correction should be treated not as a default behavior, but as a control decision governed by measurable error dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将迭代自纠正视为一个控制论反馈回路，并通过两态马尔可夫模型推导出一个简单的部署诊断指标（ECR/EIR > Acc/(1-Acc)）。实验发现仅当错误引入率（EIR）接近0%时自纠正方有益，且通过"先验证再提示"的消融实验可有效降低EIR，将有害纠正转为有益。
AI.motivation: 自纠正虽被广泛用于智能体LLM系统，但何时有益、何时有害尚不明确。作者旨在建立一个可操作的诊断框架，帮助判断何时应进行迭代自纠正。
AI.method: 将自纠正建模为控制论反馈回路（同一LLM同时作为控制器和被控对象），使用两态马尔可夫模型{正确, 错误}推导诊断条件。通过7个模型、3个数据集（GSM8K, MATH, StrategyQA）实验验证，并进行"先验证再提示"的消融实验和ASC停止策略对比。
AI.result: 发现EIR阈值接近0%（<=0.5%）是区分有益与有害自纠正的关键。仅o3-mini(+3.4pp, EIR=0%)、Claude Opus 4.6(+0.6pp, EIR~0.2%)和o4-mini(+/-0pp)不退化；GPT-5退化-1.8pp。验证优先消融可将GPT-4o-mini的EIR从2%降至0%，将-6.2pp退化转为+0.2pp。
AI.conclusion: 自纠正不应被视为默认行为，而应作为由可测量的错误动态所控制的决策。论文提供的诊断指标和提示工程策略可有效指导何时进行迭代自纠正。

title: LTBs-KAN: Linear-Time B-splines Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) are a recent neural network architecture offering an alternative to Multilayer Perceptrons (MLPs) with improved explainability and expressibility. However, KANs are significantly slower than MLPs due to the recursive nature of B-spline function computations, limiting their application. This work addresses these issues by proposing a novel base-spline Linear-Time B-splines Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (LTBs-KAN) with linear complexity. Unlike previous methods that rely on the Boor-Mansfield-Cox spline algorithm or other computationally intensive mathematical functions, our approach significantly reduces the computational burden. Additionally, we further reduce model's parameter through product-of-sums matrix factorization in the forward pass without sacrificing performance. Experiments on MNIST, Fashion-MNIST and CIFAR-10 demonstrate that LTBs-KAN achieves good time complexity and parameter reduction, when used as building architectural blocks, compared to other KAN implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LTBs-KAN，通过线性时间B样条计算和乘积和矩阵分解，在保持性能的同时大幅提升KAN的训练速度和参数效率。
AI.motivation: KAN虽然比MLP更具可解释性和表达性，但因B样条函数的递归计算导致训练速度显著慢于MLP，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 提出基于基础样条的线性时间B样条计算方法（LTBs-KAN），复杂度从递归降至线性；并通过前向传播中的乘积和矩阵分解进一步减少参数量。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10上，LTBs-KAN作为构建模块时，在时间复杂度和参数数量上均优于其他KAN实现，且性能未下降。
AI.conclusion: LTBs-KAN有效解决了KAN的计算效率瓶颈，为KAN的实用化提供了可行方案。

title: Where Should LoRA Go? Component-Type Placement in Hybrid Language Models
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/hecboar/lora-placement-hybrid
summary: Hybrid language models that interleave attention with recurrent components are increasingly competitive with pure Transformers, yet standard LoRA practice applies adapters uniformly without considering the distinct functional roles of each component type. We systematically study component-type LoRA placement across two hybrid architectures -- Qwen3.5-0.8B (sequential, GatedDeltaNet + softmax attention) and Falcon-H1-0.5B (parallel, Mamba-2 SSM + attention) -- fine-tuned on three domains and evaluated on five benchmarks. We find that the attention pathway -- despite being the minority component -- consistently outperforms full-model adaptation with 5-10x fewer trainable parameters. Crucially, adapting the recurrent backbone is destructive in sequential hybrids (-14.8 pp on GSM8K) but constructive in parallel ones (+8.6 pp). We further document a transfer asymmetry: parallel hybrids exhibit positive cross-task transfer while sequential hybrids suffer catastrophic forgetting. These results establish that hybrid topology fundamentally determines adaptation response, and that component-aware LoRA placement is a necessary design dimension for hybrid architectures.

AI.tldr: 混合架构中，注意力路径（即使占比较小）的LoRA微调优于全模型微调，且循环骨干在顺序混合中破坏性能、在并行混合中提升性能；并行混合具有正向跨任务迁移，顺序混合则遭受灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA方法在混合架构（注意力+循环组件）中均匀应用适配器，未考虑不同组件的功能角色差异，缺乏对组件特定LoRA放置的系统研究。
AI.method: 在两种混合架构（Qwen3.5-0.8B顺序混合、Falcon-H1-0.5B并行混合）上，对三个领域进行微调并在五个基准上评估，系统研究组件类型的LoRA放置策略。
AI.result: 注意力路径以5-10倍更少的可训练参数超越全模型适应；循环骨干在顺序混合中导致-14.8 pp下降，在并行混合中带来+8.6 pp提升；并行混合有正跨任务迁移，顺序混合有灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构的拓扑结构从根本上决定适应响应，组件感知的LoRA放置是混合架构必要的设计维度。

title: Enhancing a gamified tool for UML modeling education
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures 5th Workshop on Gamification in Software Development, Verification, and Validation (Gamify2026)
summary: Unified Modeling Language (UML) Use Case and Class Diagrams are fundamental modeling notations in Software Engineering (SE) education due to their importance for requirements and model-based engineering, yet their relevance is underestimated by students, who tend to dismiss the topic as secondary. Gamification has been adopted to make modeling education more appealing, but existing tools focus almost exclusively on class diagrams, leaving support for use cases and other notations unexplored. In 2025, we designed UMLegend, a gamified tool for class diagrams that offered dynamic feedback to help students learn correct modeling practices and multiple long-term mechanics to increase engagement, and performed a study with the tool. With this paper, we describe how we enhanced UMLegend following the results of the experiment so that it can support more modeling languages, with use case diagrams being added to the type of available exercises in the tool. The revised version has been refactored to have a modular architecture, to make it easier to add other software engineering topics and additional modeling notations. We also describe the potential impact we expect the new version to have, and outline a longitudinal study we intend to perform in 2026 where we will assess whether long-term UML gamification leads to improved student performance.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍UMLegend工具的增强版本，在原有类图练习基础上新增用例图支持，并重构为模块化架构以支持更多建模语言，计划2026年开展纵向研究评估长期游戏化学习对UML建模能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 学生在软件工程教育中低估了UML用例图和类图的重要性，现有游戏化工具几乎只关注类图，缺乏对用例图等其他建模符号的支持。
AI.method: 基于2025年对UMLegend工具（提供动态反馈和长期游戏化机制）的实验结果，对工具进行增强：重构为模块化架构以支持多种建模语言，新增用例图练习功能。
AI.result: UMLegend从仅支持类图的工具扩展为支持类图和用例图的模块化平台，未来可便捷添加更多软件工程主题和建模符号。
AI.conclusion: 新版UMLegend有望提升学生对多种UML建模语言的学习效果，计划通过2026年的纵向研究验证长期游戏化学习是否真正提高了学生的建模能力。

title: SAMIDARE: Advanced Tracking-by-Segmentation for Dense Scenarios
summary: Automated sports analysis demands robust multi-object tracking (MOT), yet segmentation-based methods often struggle with mask errors and ID switches in dense scenes. We propose SAMIDARE, a framework that enhances SAM2MOT for crowded scenes through three key components: (1) density-aware mask re-generation and (2) selective memory updates, both for adaptive mask control to preserve target feature integrity, and (3) state-aware association and new track initialization, which improves robustness under mutual occlusions and frequent frame-out events. Evaluated on the SportsMOT dataset, SAMIDARE achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming the baseline by 2.5 HOTA and 4.2 IDF1 points on the validation set. These results demonstrate that adaptive feature management using mask control and state-aware association provide a robust and efficient solution for dense sports tracking. Code is available at https://github.com/ZabuZabuZabu/SAMIDARE

AI.tldr: SAMIDARE是一个增强SAM2MOT的框架，通过密度感知掩码重新生成、选择性记忆更新和状态感知关联，在密集体育场景中实现SOTA多目标跟踪性能，在SportsMOT数据集上比基线提升2.5 HOTA和4.2 IDF1。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分割的多目标跟踪方法在密集场景中容易受到掩码误差和ID切换的影响，限制了自动体育分析的效果。
AI.method: 提出SAMIDARE框架，包含三个核心组件：(1)密度感知掩码重新生成；(2)选择性记忆更新；(3)状态感知关联与新轨迹初始化。
AI.result: 在SportsMOT验证集上达到SOTA，相比基线提升2.5 HOTA和4.2 IDF1。
AI.conclusion: 自适应特征管理（掩码控制+状态感知关联）为密集体育跟踪提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

title: Introducing Background Temperature to Characterise Hidden Randomness in Large Language Models
summary: Even when decoding with temperature $T=0$, large language models (LLMs) can produce divergent outputs for identical inputs. Recent work by Thinking Machines Lab highlights implementation-level sources of nondeterminism, including batch-size variation, kernel non-invariance, and floating-point non-associativity. In this short note we formalize this behavior by introducing the notion of \emph{background temperature} $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$, the effective temperature induced by an implementation-dependent perturbation process observed even when nominal $T=0$. We provide clean definitions, show how $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ relates to a stochastic perturbation governed by the inference environment $I$, and propose an empirical protocol to estimate $T_{bg}$ via the equivalent temperature $T_n(I)$ of an ideal reference system. We conclude with a set of pilot experiments run on a representative pool from the major LLM providers that demonstrate the idea and outline implications for reproducibility, evaluation, and deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"背景温度" $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ 的概念，用于形式化描述大语言模型在标称温度 $T=0$ 时仍产生的输出不确定性，并通过实验估计其大小。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在 $T=0$ 时仍会出现非确定性输出，这种来自实现层面的随机性（如批量大小变化、核函数非不变性、浮点数非结合性）影响了可重复性和评估可靠性，需要被形式化定义和量化。
AI.method: 定义了背景温度 $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ 作为实现相关扰动过程引起的有效温度，将其与推理环境 $I$ 关联，并提出通过理想参考系统的等效温度 $T_n(I)$ 来经验性估计 $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ 的实验协议。
AI.result: 在主流大语言模型提供商的代表性模型上进行了初步实验，验证了 $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ 的存在性和可估计性。
AI.conclusion: $T_{\mathrm{bg}}$ 的提出为理解 LLM 非确定性输出来源提供了形式化框架，对模型的可重复性、评估和部署具有重要启示。

title: LayerBoost: Layer-Aware Attention Reduction for Efficient LLMs
summary:
Transformers are mostly relying on softmax attention, which introduces quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length and remains a major bottleneck for efficient inference. Prior work on linear or hybrid attention typically replaces softmax attention uniformly across all layers, often leading to significant performance degradation or requiring extensive retraining to recover model quality.
  This work proposes LayerBoost, a layer-aware attention reduction method that selectively modifies the attention mechanism based on the sensitivity of individual transformer layers. It first performs a systematic sensitivity analysis on a pretrained model to identify layers that are critical for maintaining performance. Guided by this analysis, three distinct strategies can be applied: retaining standard softmax attention in highly sensitive layers, replacing it with linear sliding window attention in moderately sensitive layers, and removing attention entirely in layers that exhibit low sensitivity.
  To recover performance after these architectural modifications, we introduce a lightweight distillation-based healing phase requiring only 10M additional training tokens. LayerBoost reduces inference latency and improves throughput by up to 68% at high concurrency, while maintaining competitive model quality. It matches base model performance on several benchmarks, exhibits only minor degradations on others, and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art attention linearization methods. These efficiency gains make our method particularly well-suited for high-concurrency serving and hardware-constrained deployment scenarios, where inference cost and memory footprint are critical bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: LayerBoost提出了一种层感知的注意力缩减方法，通过敏感性分析识别Transformer中关键层，对敏感层保留标准softmax注意力、中等敏感层替换为线性滑动窗口注意力、低敏感层移除注意力，并利用轻量蒸馏（仅需10M额外训练token）恢复性能，实现高达68%的推理延迟降低和吞吐量提升，同时保持模型质量。
AI.motivation: 标准softmax注意力存在序列长度的二次复杂度问题，是高效推理的主要瓶颈。现有工作通常对所有层统一替换注意力机制，导致显著性能下降或需要大量重新训练才能恢复模型质量。
AI.method: 1）对预训练模型进行逐层敏感性分析，识别对性能关键层；2）基于敏感性采取三种策略：高敏感层保留softmax注意力、中敏感层替换为线性滑动窗口注意力、低敏感层完全移除注意力；3）引入轻量蒸馏愈合阶段，仅需10M额外训练token恢复性能。
AI.result: 在高并发场景下推理延迟降低、吞吐量提升最高达68%；在多个基准测试上匹配基线模型性能，少数基准上仅有轻微下降；显著优于现有注意力线性化方法。
AI.conclusion: LayerBoost特别适合高并发服务和硬件约束部署场景，有效解决了推理成本和内存瓶颈问题。

title: Dissociating Decodability and Causal Use in Bracket-Sequence Transformers
summary: When trained on tasks requiring an understanding of hierarchical structure, transformers have been found to represent this hierarchy in distinct ways: in the geometry of the residual stream, and in stack-like attention patterns maintaining a last-in, first-out ordering. However, it remains unclear whether these representations are causally used or merely decodable. We examine this gap in transformers trained on the Dyck language (a formal language of balanced bracket sequences), where the hierarchical ground truth is explicit. By probing and intervening on the residual stream and attention patterns, we find that depth, distance, and top-of-stack signals are all decodable, yet their causal roles diverge. Specifically, masking attention to the true top-of-stack position causes a sharp drop in long-distance accuracy, while ablating low-dimensional residual stream subspaces has comparatively little effect. These results, which extend to a templated natural language setting, suggest that even in a controlled setting where the relevant hierarchical variables are known, decodability alone does not imply causal use.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究了Transformer模型在处理层级结构任务时，残差流中的层级几何表示和注意力模式中的栈式表示是否被因果使用，还是仅仅可解码。通过在Dyck语言（平衡括号序列）和模板化自然语言上的探测和干预实验，发现深度、距离和栈顶信号都可解码，但因果作用不同：遮挡栈顶注意力会显著降低长距离准确性，而消融残差流低维子空间影响较小。结论是，可解码性不等于因果使用。
AI.motivation: 先前研究已发现Transformer在层级结构任务中会以不同方式表示层级信息（残差流几何结构和栈式注意力模式），但不清楚这些表示是被因果使用还是仅仅可解码。
AI.method: 在Dyck语言（平衡括号序列）上训练Transformer，通过探测（probing）和解耦干预（intervention）方法，分别分析残差流和注意力模式中的层级信息，并比较其因果作用。
AI.result: 深度、距离和栈顶信号都可解码，但因果作用不同。遮挡注意力到真实栈顶位置会导致长距离准确性显著下降，而消融残差流中的低维子空间影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 即使在已知相关层级变量的受控环境下，可解码性并不意味因果使用。

title: R2Code: A Self-Reflective LLM Framework for Requirements-to-Code Traceability
summary: Accurate requirement-to-code traceability is crucial for software maintenance. However, existing IR- and embedding-based methods are heavily dependent on lexical similarity, often yielding incomplete or inconsistent links across projects and languages and incurring high cost from long-context retrieval and prompting. This paper presents R2Code, an LLM-based semantic traceability framework designed to improve trace link accuracy while reducing inference cost. R2Code integrates three components: 1) a decomposition-enhanced Bidirectional Alignment Network (BAN) that aligns four-layer requirement semantics with corresponding code structures to support cross-level semantic matching; 2) a Self-Reflective Consistency Verification (SRCV) module that conducts explanation-guided consistency checking to calibrate link reliability; and 3) a Dynamic Context-Adaptive Retrieval (DCAR) mechanism that adjusts retrieval granularity and filters contexts using semantic-overlap weighting for efficient context utilization. Experiments on five public datasets spanning multiple domains and two programming languages demonstrate that R2Code consistently outperforms the strongest baselines, achieving an average F1 gain of 7.4%, while reducing token consumption by up to 41.7% through adaptive context control.

AI.tldr: 提出R2Code框架，通过语义对齐、自反思验证和动态上下文检索，提升需求到代码的追踪准确率并降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有IR和嵌入方法依赖词汇相似性，导致跨项目/语言的追踪链接不完整且不一致，长上下文检索和提示成本高。
AI.method: 1) 分解增强的双向对齐网络(BAN)实现四层语义与代码结构对齐；2) 自反思一致性验证(SRCV)进行解释引导的可靠性校准；3) 动态上下文自适应检索(DCAR)通过语义重叠加权调整粒度并过滤上下文。
AI.result: 在5个公共数据集上，平均F1提升7.4%，令牌消耗降低最多41.7%。
AI.conclusion: R2Code在跨领域和跨语言的场景下显著提升了需求-代码追踪性能，同时大幅降低了计算开销。

title: Learning Reactive Human Motion Generation from Paired Interaction Data Using Transformer-Based Models
summary: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled the generation of videos from textual descriptions as well as the prediction of future sequences from input videos. Similarly, in human motion modeling, motions can be generated from text or predicted from a single person's motion sequence. However, these approaches primarily focus on single-agent motion generation. In contrast, this study addresses the problem of generating the motion of one person based on the motion of another in interaction scenarios, where the two motions are mutually dependent. We construct a dataset of paired action-reaction motion sequences extracted from boxing match videos and investigate the effectiveness of Transformer-based models for this task. Specifically, we implement and compare three models: a simple Transformer, iTransformer, and Crossformer. In addition, we introduce a person ID embedding to explicitly distinguish between individuals, enabling the model to maintain structural consistency and better capture interaction dynamics. Experimental results show that the simple Transformer can generate plausible interaction-aware motions without suffering from posture collapse, while iTransformer and Crossformer accumulate errors over time, leading to unstable motion generation. Furthermore, the proposed person ID embedding contributes to preventing structural collapse and improving motion consistency. These results highlight the importance of explicitly modeling individual identity in interaction-aware motion generation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究互动场景中基于一人运动生成另一人运动的问题，构建了拳击配对动作数据集，对比了三种Transformer模型，并引入人物ID嵌入来区分个体。实验表明简单Transformer效果最好，而iTransformer和Crossformer会累积误差，人物ID嵌入有助于保持结构一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多聚焦于单智能体运动生成（从文本生成或单一人体运动预测），缺乏对互动场景中两人运动相互依赖关系的研究。本文旨在解决互动场景中基于一人运动生成另一人运动的问题。
AI.method: 构建了拳击比赛视频中提取的配对动作-反应运动序列数据集；对比了三种模型：简单Transformer、iTransformer和Crossformer；引入人物ID嵌入来显式区分个体，帮助模型保持结构一致性并捕捉互动动态。
AI.result: 简单Transformer能生成合理的互动感知运动且无姿态崩溃；iTransformer和Crossformer随时间累积误差导致运动生成不稳定；人物ID嵌入有助于防止结构崩溃并提升运动一致性。
AI.conclusion: 在互动感知运动生成中，显式建模个体身份非常重要。简单Transformer在该任务上优于更复杂的iTransformer和Crossformer。

title: CognitiveTwin: Robust Multi-Modal Digital Twins for Predicting Cognitive Decline in Alzheimer's Disease
summary: Predicting individual cognitive decline in Alzheimer's disease (AD) is difficult due to the heterogeneity of disease progression. Reliable clinical tools require not only high accuracy but also fairness across demographics and robustness to missing data. We present CognitiveTwin, a digital twin framework that predicts patient-specific cognitive trajectories. The model integrates multi-modal longitudinal data (cognitive scores, magnetic resonance imaging, positron emission tomography, cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers, and genetics). We use a Transformer-based architecture to fuse these modalities and a Deep Markov Model to capture temporal dynamics. We trained and evaluated the framework using data from 1,666 patients in the TADPOLE (Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative) dataset. We assessed the model for prediction error, demographic fairness, and robustness to missing-not-at-random (MNAR) data patterns. ognitiveTwin provides accurate and personalized predictions of cognitive decline. Its demonstrated fairness across patient demographics and resilience to clinical dropout make it a reliable tool for clinical trial enrichment and personalized care planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CognitiveTwin数字孪生框架，利用Transformer和深度马尔可夫模型融合多模态纵向数据（认知评分、MRI、PET、脑脊液生物标志物、遗传学），在TADPOLE数据集1666名患者上实现了高精度、人口公平性且对缺失数据鲁棒的认知衰退预测。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的疾病进展具有高度异质性，现有预测工具难以同时满足高精度、跨人口统计群体的公平性以及对缺失数据的鲁棒性需求。
AI.method: 构建CognitiveTwin数字孪生框架，采用Transformer架构融合多模态数据，结合深度马尔可夫模型（Deep Markov Model）捕捉纵向时间动态。在TADPOLE（ADNI）数据集的1666名患者上进行训练和评估。
AI.result: CognitiveTwin在预测误差、人口统计公平性以及对非随机缺失（MNAR）数据模式的鲁棒性方面均表现良好，提供了准确且个性化的认知衰退预测。
AI.conclusion: CognitiveTwin在人口公平性和临床脱落鲁棒性方面表现出色，可作为可靠的临床试验富集和个性化护理规划工具。

title: Learning Coverage- and Power-Optimal Transmitter Placement from Building Maps: A Comparative Study of Direct and Indirect Neural Approaches
summary: Optimal wireless transmitter placement is a central task in radio-network planning, yet exhaustive search becomes prohibitively expensive at scale. This paper studies the single-transmitter setting under a fixed learned propagation surrogate, where exhaustive per-pixel evaluation remains tractable and provides surrogate-exact ground truth. We introduce a dataset of 167,525 urban scenarios (RadioMapSeer-Deployment) with dual surrogate-exact labels for coverage-optimal and power-optimal transmitter locations. Ground-truth analysis reveals an asymmetric coverage-power trade-off: coverage-optimal placement sacrifices 13.86% of received power, whereas power-optimal placement sacrifices only 5.50% of coverage; the best achievable balanced placement lies at $\bar{d}=2.60$ from the ideal point (100%,100%). We evaluate two learning formulations: indirect heatmap-based models that predict received-power radio maps, and direct score-map models that predict the objective landscape over feasible transmitter locations. Within the heatmap family, discriminative models deliver one-shot predictions 1350-2400x faster than exhaustive search, while diffusion models additionally support multi-sample inference that improves single-objective performance and, by reusing the same sample pool under a balanced criterion, recovers strong balanced placements without explicit multi-objective training. Dual score-map strategies combining power and coverage score maps match the exhaustive balanced optimum ($\bar{d}=2.60$) and remain close across smaller candidate budgets, at 14-22x speedups after candidate re-evaluation. Both formulations admit very fast one-shot inference; on this benchmark, dual score-map methods are strongest for balanced placement, whereas heatmap formulations remain attractive for their physically meaningful intermediate maps and, in the diffusion setting, for inference-time search.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无线发射机最优放置问题，构建了包含16.7万个城市场景的数据集(RadioMapSeer-Deployment)，揭示了覆盖-功率的非对称权衡关系，并系统评估了两种学习范式（间接热图模型与直接得分图模型）。结果表明：双得分图策略在平衡放置上最强（达到穷举搜索最优），而热图模型因提供物理意义中间图和扩散推理搜索能力仍具吸引力。
AI.motivation: 无线发射机最优放置是无线网络规划的核心任务，但穷举搜索在大规模场景下计算成本过高。现有方法缺乏对单发射机设置下覆盖-功率权衡的系统研究，且缺少大规模标注数据集与学习方法的全面评估。
AI.method: 构建RadioMapSeer-Deployment数据集（167,525个城市场景），包含覆盖最优和功率最优的双代理精确标签。评估两类模型：1) 间接热图模型（判别式+扩散式）预测接收功率地图；2) 直接得分图模型预测目标景观。扩散模型支持多样本推理，双得分图策略组合覆盖与功率得分图。
AI.result: 覆盖最优放置牺牲13.86%接收功率，功率最优仅牺牲5.50%覆盖；最佳平衡点在(100%,100%)理想点的距离为2.60。判别式热图模型加速1350-2400倍，扩散模型通过多推理样本改善单目标性能；双得分图策略匹配穷举平衡最优(2.60)，在14-22倍加速下保持近优性能。
AI.conclusion: 双得分图方法在平衡放置任务上表现最强，热图模型因其物理可解释的中间地图和扩散推理搜索能力仍具独特价值。

title: SHAPE: Unifying Safety, Helpfulness and Pedagogy for Educational LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely explored in educational scenarios. We identify a critical vulnerability in current educational LLMs, pedagogical jailbreaks, where students use answer-inducing prompts to elicit solutions rather than scaffolded instructions. To enable systematic study, we unify and formalize safe, helpful, and pedagogical behaviors with a knowledge-mastery graph and introduce SHAPE, a benchmark of 9,087 student-question pairs for evaluating tutoring behavior under adversarial pressure. We propose a graph-augmented tutoring pipeline that infers prerequisite concepts from queries, identifies mastery gaps, and routes generation between instructing and problem-solving via explicit gating. Experiments across multiple LLMs show that our method yields significantly improved safety under two pedagogical jailbreak settings, while maintaining near-ceiling helpfulness under the same evaluation protocol. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/MAPS-research/SHaPE

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对教育场景中大语言模型的“教学越狱”漏洞，并设计了SHAPE基准测试（9,087个学生-问题对）以及一种基于知识图谱增强的教学流水线，通过显式门控机制在指令生成和问题求解之间路由，显著提升了模型在对抗性压力下的安全性，同时保持了高帮助性。
AI.motivation: 当前教育领域的大语言模型存在一个关键漏洞：学生可以通过诱导性提示（即“教学越狱”）让模型直接给出答案，而非提供逐步引导的教学内容。作者希望系统性地研究和防御这一安全威胁。
AI.method: 1) 统一并形式化了安全、有帮助和教学行为，使用知识掌握图（knowledge-mastery graph）进行建模。2) 构建SHAPE基准测试（9,087个学生-问题对），用于评估模型在对抗性压力下的教学行为。3) 提出图增强教学流水线：从查询中推断先决概念、识别掌握缺口，并通过显式门控机制在“教学指导”和“问题求解”之间进行路由生成。
AI.result: 在多个大语言模型上的实验表明，该方法在两种教学越狱设置下显著提升了安全性，同时在同一评估协议下保持了接近上限的帮助性。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强的显式门控机制能有效防御教育场景中的“教学越狱”攻击，在不牺牲帮助性的前提下大幅提升安全性，为构建安全可靠的教育LLM提供了可行方案。

title: Gamifying Architectural Governance to Reduce Organizational Coupling in Microservice Systems
summary: Microservice is a popular software architecture that relies on decentralized teams and clear service ownership to support modularity and scalability. However, in practice, developers frequently contribute across multiple services, creating organizational coupling (OC) that gradually erodes architectural boundaries and increases coordination overhead. This study proposes a vision for behavior-driven architectural governance through gamification in microservice systems to influence developer behavior and reduce OC. Our approach introduces a gamified framework that continuously mines repository data to detect architectural boundary violations and increasing service dependencies, and translates those signals into gameful designs, including points, badges, leaderboards, and architecture improvement quests. We outline a conceptual framework that integrates repository mining, architectural metrics, and gamification mechanisms to encourage developers to maintain service boundaries and improve architectural maintainability. Furthermore, we present an evaluation roadmap to assess the impact of gamified OC governance and developer engagement. This work aims to open a new research direction at the intersection of software architecture governance, socio-technical analysis, and gamification, highlighting the potential of behavioral incentives to support sustainable microservice evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过游戏化框架（积分、徽章、排行榜、架构改进任务）来治理微服务系统中的组织耦合问题，通过持续挖掘仓库数据检测架构边界违规，以行为激励方式引导开发者维护服务边界，减少跨服务贡献带来的协调开销。
AI.motivation: 微服务架构中开发者频繁跨服务贡献导致组织耦合（OC），侵蚀架构边界并增加协调成本，现有方法缺乏对开发者行为的有效引导。
AI.method: 提出游戏化框架，整合仓库数据挖掘、架构度量与游戏化机制（积分、徽章、排行榜、架构改进任务），通过行为激励引导开发者维护服务边界。
AI.result: 提出了概念框架和评估路线图，尚未给出实证结果，属于愿景性工作。
AI.conclusion: 开辟了软件架构治理、社会技术分析与游戏化交叉的新研究方向，指出行为激励在支持微服务可持续演化方面的潜力。

title: Unlocking Optical Prior: Spectrum-Guided Knowledge Transfer for SAR Generalized Category Discovery
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) holds significant promise for the label-scarce Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) domain, yet its efficacy is severely constrained by the cross-modal incompatibility between the inherent optical prior of the Large Vision Models (LVMs) and SAR imagery. Existing domain adaptation methods often lack an inductive bias that reflects imaging characteristics, consequently failing to effectively transfer optical prior into the SAR domain. To address this issue, the Modal Discrepancy Curve (MDC) is introduced to model cross-modal discrepancy as a structured frequency-domain descriptor derived from spectral energy distributions. Leveraging this formulation, we propose the MDC-guided Cross-modal Prior Transfer (MCPT) framework, a pre-training paradigm that operates on paired optical-SAR data. Within this framework, Adaptive Frequency Tokenization (AFT) converts the MDC into learnable tokens, and Frequency-aware Expert Refinement (FER) performs band-wise discrepancy-aware feature refinement using these tokens. Based on the refined representations, contrastive learning aligns refined embeddings across modalities and internalizes the adaptation pattern. Ultimately, the superior SAR feature representation capability learned during paired pre-training is applied to downstream single-modal SAR-GCD tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple mainstream datasets, indicating that frequency-domain discrepancy modeling enables more effective adaptation of optical prior to SAR imagery.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SAR图像中广义类别发现（GCD）任务受限于大视觉模型（LVM）的光学先验与SAR图像之间的跨模态不兼容性问题，提出了模态差异曲线（MDC）来建模跨模态差异，并设计了MDC引导的跨模态先验迁移（MCPT）框架，通过自适应频率标记化（AFT）和频率感知专家精炼（FER）实现光学先验到SAR域的有效迁移，在多个主流数据集上取得了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 通用类别发现（GCD）在标签稀缺的SAR领域具有重要前景，但大视觉模型的光学先验与SAR图像之间存在跨模态不兼容性，现有域适应方法缺乏反映成像特性的归纳偏置，无法有效将光学先验迁移到SAR领域。
AI.method: 提出模态差异曲线（MDC）作为频率域描述子来建模跨模态差异；提出MDC引导的跨模态先验迁移（MCPT）框架，包含自适应频率标记化（AFT）将MDC转化为可学习标记，以及频率感知专家精炼（FER）进行带感知的差异特征精炼，通过对比学习对齐跨模态嵌入并内化适应模式。
AI.result: 在多个主流数据集上取得了最先进的性能，表明频率域差异建模能够更有效地将光学先验适应到SAR图像中。
AI.conclusion: 频率域差异建模是实现光学先验向SAR图像有效迁移的关键，MCPT框架通过显式建模模态差异并引导特征学习，显著提升了SAR-GCD任务性能。

title: Reliability Auditing for Downstream LLM tasks in Psychiatry: LLM-Generated Hospitalization Risk Scores
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized in clinical reasoning and risk assessment. However, their interpretive reliability in critical and indeterminate domains such as psychiatry remains unclear. Prior work has identified algorithmic biases and prompt sensitivity in these systems, raising concerns about how contextual information may influence model outputs, but there remains no systematic way to assess these, especially in the psychiatric domain. We propose an approach for reliability auditing downstream LLM tasks by structuring evaluation around the impact of prompt design and the inclusion of medically insignificant inputs on predicted hospitalization risk scores, which is often the first downstream AI clinical-decision-making task. In our audit, a cohort of synthetic patient profiles (n = 50) is generated, each consisting of 15 clinically relevant features and up to 50 clinically insignificant features, across four prompt reframings (neutral, logical, human impact, clinical judgment). We audit four LLMs (Gemini 2.5 Flash, LLaMa 3.3 70b, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-4o mini), and our results show that including medically insignificant variables resulted in a statistically significant increase in the absolute mean predicted hospitalization risk and output variability across all models and prompts, indicating reduced predictive stability as contextual noise increased. Clinically insignificant features had an effect on instability across many model-prompt conditions, and prompt variations independently affected the trajectory of instability in a model-dependent manner. These findings quantify how LLM-based psychiatric risk assessments are sensitive to non-clinical information, highlighting the need for systematic evaluations of attributional stability and uncertainty behavior like this before clinical deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对LLM在精神科住院风险评估中的可靠性审计方法，通过引入临床无关特征和不同提示框架，发现这些因素会显著增加预测不稳定性和输出变异，表明LLM在精神科临床决策中易受非临床信息干扰。
AI.motivation: LLM在临床推理和风险评估中应用日益广泛，但在精神科等关键且不确定领域中的解释可靠性尚不明确。已有研究指出算法偏见和提示敏感性，但缺乏系统的评估方法，尤其是在精神科领域。
AI.method: 构建50个合成患者档案（15个临床相关特征 + 最多50个临床无关特征），采用4种提示框架（中立、逻辑、人文影响、临床判断），对4种LLM（Gemini 2.5 Flash、LLaMa 3.3 70b、Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-4o mini）进行住院风险评分审计。
AI.result: 纳入临床无关变量导致所有模型和提示条件下绝对平均预测住院风险及输出变异显著增加，表明预测稳定性随上下文噪声增加而下降。临床无关特征和提示变化独立影响不稳定性轨迹，且具有模型依赖性。
AI.conclusion: LLM在精神科风险评估中对非临床信息敏感，临床部署前需进行系统性的归因稳定性和不确定性行为评估。

title: Voice Under Revision: Large Language Models and the Normalization of Personal Narrative
summary:
This study examines how large language model rewriting alters the style and narrative texture of personal narratives. It analyzes 300 personal narratives rewritten by three frontier LLMs under three prompt conditions: generic improvement, rewrite-only, and voice-preserving revision. Change is measured across 13 linguistic markers drawn from computational stylistics, including function words, vocabulary diversity, word length, punctuation, contractions, first-person pronouns, and emotion words.
  Across models and prompt conditions, LLM rewriting produces a consistent pattern of stylistic normalization. Function words, contractions, and first-person pronouns decrease, while vocabulary diversity, word length, and punctuation elaboration increase. These shifts occur whether the prompt asks the model to "improve" the text or simply to "rewrite" it. Voice-preserving prompts reduce the magnitude of the changes but do not eliminate their direction. Stylometric analysis shows that rewritten texts converge in feature space and become harder to match back to their source texts. Additional narrative markers indicate a shift from embedded to distanced narration, and from explicit causal reasoning to compressed abstraction.
  The findings suggest that contemporary LLMs exert a directional pull toward a more polished, less situated register. This has consequences for digital humanities and computational text analysis, where features such as function words, pronouns, contractions, and punctuation often serve as evidence for style, voice, authorship, and corpus integrity. LLM revision should therefore be understood not merely as surface-level editing, but as a consequential form of textual mediation.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析300篇由三个前沿LLM在三种提示条件下重写的个人叙事，发现LLM重写会导致风格标准化：功能词、缩写和第一人称代词减少，词汇多样性、词长和标点复杂度增加。即使使用保留声音的提示也无法消除这种趋势，表明LLM重写是一种方向性的文本调节，而非表面编辑。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型重写如何改变个人叙事的风格和叙事质感，揭示LLM重写不仅仅是表面编辑，而是一种具有方向性影响的文本调节形式。
AI.method: 分析300篇由三个前沿LLM在三种提示条件（通用改进、仅重写、保留声音修订）下重写的个人叙事。使用13个计算文体学标记（功能词、词汇多样性、词长、标点、缩写、第一人称代词、情感词等）测量变化。
AI.result: LLM重写产生一致的模式：功能词、缩写、第一人称代词减少；词汇多样性、词长、标点复杂度增加。保留声音的提示能降低变化幅度但无法消除方向。重写文本在特征空间中趋同，难以匹配回源文本。叙事标记显示从嵌入式叙述转向疏离式叙述，从显式因果推理转向压缩抽象。
AI.conclusion: 当代LLM对文本产生一种方向性拉力，使其趋向更 polished、更少情境化的语域。这对数字人文和计算文本分析有重要影响，因为功能词、代词、缩写、标点等常被用作风格、声音、作者身份和语料库完整性的证据。

title: Test Design and Review Argumentation in AI-Assisted Test Generation
comment: Accepted for ITEQS 2026, co-located with ICST 2026
summary: AI assistants can increasingly generate and evolve test cases. The challenge is no longer merely to produce them, but also to help engineers understand why a generated artefact exists and what supports it. Existing work has focused on classifying testing techniques, linking requirements to tests and structuring system assurance arguments, but it does not explicitly represent the argumentation behind individual test design decisions. We propose a conceptual taxonomy and a structured template for AI-assisted test generation that characterizes a test case by its test goal, claim, reason, and evidence. The taxonomy is intended for both constructive use during test design and retrospective use during review, to assess the quality of the attached argument rather than the plausibility or objective value of the generated test cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概念分类法和结构化模板，用于表征AI辅助生成的测试用例背后的论证过程，包括测试目标、主张、理由和证据，旨在支持测试设计构建与回顾性评审。
AI.motivation: 现有工作关注测试技术分类、需求与测试的链接以及系统保证论证的结构化，但未能显式表示单个测试设计决策背后的论证过程。随着AI助手越来越多地生成和演化测试用例，工程师不仅需要理解测试用例本身，还需要理解其存在的原因和支撑依据。
AI.method: 提出一个概念分类法（taxonomy）和结构化模板，将测试用例表征为四个核心要素：测试目标（test goal）、主张（claim）、理由（reason）和证据（evidence）。该模板既可应用于测试设计的构建阶段（constructive use），也可应用于评审阶段（retrospective use）。
AI.result: 该方法关注的是评估测试用例所附论证的质量，而非生成测试用例的合理性或客观价值。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分类法和模板为AI辅助测试生成提供了显式的论证表示机制，弥补了现有工作在单个测试设计决策论证层面的空白，有助于工程师更好地理解和评审AI生成的测试用例。

title: Uni-Encoder Meets Multi-Encoders: Representation Before Fusion for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
summary: Multimodal MRI offers complementary information for brain tumor segmentation, but clinical scans often lack one or more modalities, which degrades segmentation performance. In this paper, we propose UniME (Uni-Encoder Meets Multi-Encoders), a two-stage heterogeneous method for brain tumor segmentation with missing modalities that reconciles the trade-offs among fine-grained structure capture, cross-modal complementarity modeling, and exploitation of available modalities. The idea is to decouple representation learning from segmentation via a two-stage heterogeneous architecture. Stage 1 pretrains a single ViT Uni-Encoder with masked image modeling to establish a unified representation robust to missing modalities. Stage 2 adds modality-specific CNN Multi-Encoders to extract high-resolution, multi-scale, fine-grained features. We fuse these features with the global representation to produce precise segmentations. Experiments on BraTS 2023 and BraTS 2024 show that UniME outperforms previous methods under incomplete multi-modal scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/Hooorace-S/UniME

AI.tldr: 提出UniME，一种两阶段异质架构方法，通过Stage 1的单一ViT统一编码器（掩码图像建模预训练）和Stage 2的多个CNN专用编码器（提取细粒度特征）的协同，解决脑肿瘤分割中MRI模态缺失问题，在BraTS 2023/2024上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 临床MRI扫描常缺失一种或多种模态，导致分割性能下降。现有方法难以同时兼顾细粒度结构捕获、跨模态互补性建模和可用模态的有效利用，需要一种能调和这三者权衡的方案。
AI.method: 两阶段异质架构：Stage 1用掩码图像建模预训练单个ViT统一编码器，建立对缺失模态鲁棒的统一表征；Stage 2添加多个模态专用的CNN编码器，提取高分辨率、多尺度的细粒度特征，并与全局表征融合以生成精确分割。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2023和BraTS 2024数据集上，UniME在不完全多模态场景下优于此前所有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦表征学习与分割任务，两阶段异质设计有效调和了细粒度特征、跨模态互补性和可用模态利用之间的矛盾，为缺失模态下的脑肿瘤分割提供了新范式。

title: From Skills to Talent: Organising Heterogeneous Agents as a Real-World Company
summary: Individual agent capabilities have advanced rapidly through modular skills and tool integrations, yet multi-agent systems remain constrained by fixed team structures, tightly coupled coordination logic, and session-bound learning. We argue that this reflects a deeper absence: a principled organisational layer that governs how a workforce of agents is assembled, governed, and improved over time, decoupled from what individual agents know. To fill this gap, we introduce \emph{OneManCompany (OMC)}, a framework that elevates multi-agent systems to the organisational level. OMC encapsulates skills, tools, and runtime configurations into portable agent identities called \emph{Talents}, orchestrated through typed organisational interfaces that abstract over heterogeneous backends. A community-driven \emph{Talent Market} enables on-demand recruitment, allowing the organisation to close capability gaps and reconfigure itself dynamically during execution. Organisational decision-making is operationalised through an \emph{Explore-Execute-Review} ($\text{E}^2$R) tree search, which unifies planning, execution, and evaluation in a single hierarchical loop: tasks are decomposed top-down into accountable units and execution outcomes are aggregated bottom-up to drive systematic review and refinement. This loop provides formal guarantees on termination and deadlock freedom while mirroring the feedback mechanisms of human enterprises. Together, these contributions transform multi-agent systems from static, pre-configured pipelines into self-organising and self-improving AI organisations capable of adapting to open-ended tasks across diverse domains. Empirical evaluation on PRDBench shows that OMC achieves an $84.67\%$ success rate, surpassing the state of the art by $15.48$ percentage points, with cross-domain case studies further demonstrating its generality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OneManCompany（OMC）框架，通过可移植的智能体身份（Talents）、类型化组织接口、人才市场和E²R树搜索机制，将多智能体系统从静态管线升级为自组织、自改进的AI组织，在PRDBench上达到84.67%成功率，超越SOTA 15.48个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有MAS受限于固定团队结构、紧耦合协调逻辑和会话内学习，缺乏原则性的组织层来独立于个体智能体能力地管理智能体工作力的组装、治理和持续改进。
AI.method: OMC框架包含：(1) Talents——封装技能、工具和运行配置的可移植智能体身份；(2) 类型化组织接口——抽象异构后端；(3) 人才市场——社区驱动的按需招聘机制；(4) E²R树搜索——统一规划、执行和评估的层次化循环，提供终止和无死锁保证。
AI.result: 在PRDBench上OMC达到84.67%成功率，比SOTA高15.48个百分点，跨领域案例研究验证了其通用性。
AI.conclusion: OMC将多智能体系统从静态预配置管线转变为能适应开放任务的自我组织、自我改进的AI组织，具备形式化保证和卓越性能。

title: PrivUn: Unveiling Latent Ripple Effects and Shallow Forgetting in Privacy Unlearning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often memorize private information during training, raising serious privacy concerns. While machine unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, its true effectiveness against privacy attacks remains unclear. To address this, we propose PrivUn, a new evaluation framework that systematically assesses unlearning robustness through three-tier attack scenarios: direct retrieval, in-context learning recovery, and fine-tuning restoration; combined with quantitative analysis using forgetting scores, association metrics, and forgetting depth assessment. Our study exposes significant weaknesses in current unlearning methods, revealing two key findings: 1) unlearning exhibits gradient-driven ripple effects: unlike traditional forgetting which follows semantic relations (e.g., knowledge graphs), privacy unlearning propagates across latent gradient-based associations; and 2) most methods suffer from shallow forgetting, failing to remove private information distributed across multiple deep model layers. To validate these insights, we explore two strategies: association-aware core-set selection that leverages gradient similarity, and multi-layer deep intervention through representational constraints. These strategies represent a paradigm shift from shallow forgetting to deep forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrivUn框架，系统评估大模型隐私遗忘的鲁棒性，发现遗忘存在梯度驱动的涟漪效应和浅层遗忘问题，并提出两种深层遗忘策略。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法在应对隐私攻击时的真实有效性尚不明确，缺乏系统性评估框架来检验遗忘后的隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 提出PrivUn评估框架，包含三层攻击场景（直接检索、上下文学习恢复、微调恢复）和三种定量分析指标（遗忘分数、关联度量、遗忘深度评估）；并探索两种策略：基于梯度相似性的关联感知核心集选择和通过表征约束的多层深度干预。
AI.result: 发现两个关键现象：1) 隐私遗忘呈现梯度驱动的涟漪效应（而非传统语义关系驱动）；2) 多数方法存在浅层遗忘问题，无法消除分布在多个深层模型层中的隐私信息。
AI.conclusion: 当前隐私遗忘方法存在根本性缺陷，需要从浅层遗忘向深层遗忘范式转变，两种提出的策略展示了改善方向。

title: When AI Speaks, Whose Values Does It Express? A Cross-Cultural Audit of Individualism-Collectivism Bias in Large Language Models
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables. Data and code: https://github.com/pruthvinathJV/ai-values-misalignment-study
summary:
When you ask an AI assistant for advice about your career, your marriage, or a conflict with your family, does it give you the same answer regardless of where you are from? We tested this systematically by presenting three leading AI systems (Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.4, and Gemini 2.5 Flash) with ten real-life personal dilemmas, framed for users from 10 countries across 5 continents in 7 languages (n=840 scored responses). We compared AI advice against World Values Survey Wave 7 data measuring what people in each country actually believe.
  All three AI systems consistently gave Western-style, individualist advice even to users from societies that prioritize family, community, and authority, significantly more so than local values would predict (mean gap +0.76 on a 1-5 scale; t=15.65, p<0.001). The gap is largest for Nigeria (+1.85) and India (+0.82). Japan is the sole exception: AI systems treated Japanese users as more group-oriented than surveys show, revealing that AI encodes outdated stereotypes. Claude and GPT-5.4 show nearly identical bias magnitude, while Gemini is lower but still significant. The models diverge in mechanism: Claude shifts further collectivist in the user's native language; Gemini shifts more individualist; GPT-5.4 responds only to stated country identity. These findings point to a systemic homogenization of values across frontier AI. Data, code, and scoring pipeline are openly released.

AI.tldr: 三大前沿AI系统（Claude Sonnet 4.5、GPT-5.4、Gemini 2.5 Flash）在面对来自10个国家用户的个人困境咨询时，始终给出西方式、个人主义导向的建议，与当地实际价值观存在显著偏差（平均差距+0.76），仅有日本被AI赋予了过时的集体主义刻板印象。这揭示了AI系统存在系统性价值观同质化问题。
AI.motivation: 探究AI助手在面对不同国家背景用户时，是否会给出差异化、符合当地价值观的建议，还是表现出统一的西方中心主义偏见。
AI.method: 向三个AI系统（Claude、GPT-5.4、Gemini）呈现10个真实生活困境，分别从10个国家、7种语言的用户视角提问，共收集840份评分回应，并与World Values Survey Wave 7的实际国民价值观数据进行对比。
AI.result: 所有AI系统均显著偏向西方个人主义价值观（平均差距+0.76，t=15.65，p<0.001），尼日利亚（+1.85）和印度（+0.82）差距最大。日本是唯一例外，AI对日本用户的集体主义预期反而超过了实际数据。Claude和GPT-5.4偏误幅度相近，Gemini较低但仍显著。三个模型机制不同：Claude在用户母语下更集体主义，Gemini更个人主义，GPT-5.4仅对stated country identity做出反应。
AI.conclusion: 前沿AI系统存在系统性价值观同质化，忽视文化多样性，编码了西方中心主义偏见（日本案例则体现了过时的刻板印象）。这种现象可能导致AI建议在全球范围内推广单一文化价值观。

title: A Comparison of ROS 2 and AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform Against Industry-Elicited Automotive Middleware Requirements
summary: In software-defined vehicles, automotive middleware plays a fundamental role in enabling efficient communication, integration, and coordination among software components. This paper examines how well two of the currently most popular middleware frameworks, ROS 2 Jazzy and AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform R24-11, meet practical requirements elicited from automotive software engineers at one of the major automotive supplier companies, ZF Group.
