AI.method: 1) 可靠性估计分支（Reliability Estimation Branch）生成空间可靠性图以建模遮挡鲁棒性；2) 两种空间对齐损失（SAL 和 SCEL）对齐特征并突出显著区域；3) 伪对应策略（pseudo-correspondence）在弱监督下生成密集局部特征监督；4) 自适应候选调度器（Adaptive Candidate Scheduler）根据全局相似度动态调整候选池大小。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，内存占用轻量，推理速度相比 FoL 提升 40%。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应融合全局与局部证据并加权局部匹配可靠性，FoL++ 超越了传统的独立匹配系统，验证了区域可靠性建模与自适应调度在 VPR 中的有效性。

title: Revisiting Neural Activation Coverage for Uncertainty Estimation
comment: Published in 34th European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks, Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning, ESANN 2026
summary: Neural activation coverage (NAC) is a recently-proposed technique for out-of-distribution detection and generalization. We build upon this promising foundation and extend the method to work as an uncertainty estimation technique for already-trained artificial neural networks in the domain of regression. Our experiments confirm NAC uncertainty scores to be more meaningful than other techniques, e.g. Monte-Carlo Dropout.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将神经激活覆盖（NAC）扩展为回归任务中的不确定性估计方法，实验证明其优于MC Dropout等技术。
AI.motivation: NAC原本用于分布外检测和泛化，作者希望将其扩展为回归问题中已训练神经网络的不确定性估计技术。
AI.method: 基于NAC框架，将其改造为适用于回归任务的不确定性估计方法，并与Monte-Carlo Dropout等基线方法进行对比。
AI.result: NAC不确定性评分比其他技术（如MC Dropout）更具意义和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: NAC可以有效地作为回归任务中神经网络的不确定性估计方法，优于现有常用技术。

title: Learning Evidence Highlighting for Frozen LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can reason well, yet often miss decisive evidence when it is buried in long, noisy contexts. We introduce HiLight, an Evidence Emphasis framework that decouples evidence selection from reasoning for frozen LLM solvers. HiLight avoids compressing or rewriting the input, which can discard or distort evidence, by training a lightweight Emphasis Actor to insert minimal highlight tags around pivotal spans in the unaltered context. A frozen Solver then performs downstream reasoning on the emphasized input. We cast highlighting as a weakly supervised decision-making problem and optimize the Actor with reinforcement learning using only the Solver's task reward, requiring no evidence labels and no access to or modification of the Solver. Across sequential recommendation and long-context question answering, HiLight consistently improves performance over strong prompt-based and automated prompt-optimization baselines. The learned emphasis policy transfers zero-shot to both smaller and larger unseen Solver families, including an API-based Solver, suggesting that the Actor captures genuine, reusable evidence structure rather than overfitting to a single backbone.

AI.tldr: HiLight是一种证据强调框架，通过轻量级Actor在长上下文中插入高亮标记来突出关键证据，不修改原始输入，使用强化学习优化，无需证据标签，在序列推荐和长上下文问答任务上优于基线方法，且学到的策略可零样本迁移到不同规模的模型。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在长且有噪声的上下文中容易遗漏关键证据，现有方法（如压缩或重写输入）可能丢弃或扭曲证据，因此需要一种不改变原始输入且能突出关键证据的方法。
AI.method: HiLight将证据选择与推理解耦，训练轻量级Emphasis Actor在原始上下文中插入高亮标记来突出关键段落，冻结的Solver（LLM）在强调后的输入上进行推理。将高亮视为弱监督决策问题，使用强化学习仅基于Solver的任务奖励优化Actor，无需证据标签或修改Solver。
AI.result: 在序列推荐和长上下文问答任务上，HiLight优于强提示基线和自动提示优化基线。学到的强调策略可零样本迁移到不同规模（更小和更大）的未见Solver家族，包括基于API的Solver。
AI.conclusion: HiLight通过强调关键证据而非修改输入，有效提升了LLM在长上下文场景中的推理性能，且学到的证据结构具有通用性和可迁移性，说明Actor捕捉到了真正的、可复用的证据结构而非过拟合到单个模型。

title: SpaMEM: Benchmarking Dynamic Spatial Reasoning via Perception-Memory Integration in Embodied Environments
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced static visual--spatial reasoning, yet they often fail to preserve long-horizon spatial coherence in embodied settings where beliefs must be continuously revised from egocentric observations under environmental change. We introduce SpaMEM (Spatial Memory from Action Sequences), a large-scale diagnostic benchmark that isolates the mechanics of spatial belief evolution via action-conditioned scene transformations (spawn, place, remove) over long interaction horizons. SpaMEM is built on a physically grounded dataset with 10,601,392 high-fidelity images across four modalities (RGB, depth, instance, semantic segmentation), collected from 25,000+ interaction sequences in 1,000 procedurally generated houses. We formalize embodied spatial reasoning as a three-level hierarchy with 15 diagnostic tasks: Level 1 measures atomic spatial perception from single observations; Level 2 probes temporal reasoning with oracle textual state histories to factor out perceptual noise; and Level 3 requires end-to-end belief maintenance from raw visual streams under the same task dimensions. We further evaluate both short-term (step-wise) updates and long-term (episodic) reconstruction. Benchmarking representative open-source VLM families reveals a consistent stacked bottleneck: coordinate-consistent grounding remains a hard ceiling, and the sharp collapse from Level 2 to Level 3 exposes a pronounced symbolic scaffolding dependency, where models succeed with text-based bookkeeping but struggle to sustain robust visual memory. SpaMEM provides a granular diagnostic standard and motivates explicit mechanisms for state representation, belief revision, and long-horizon episodic integration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpaMEM基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在具身空间推理中的空间信念演化能力。该基准包含超千万张图像，设计15个诊断任务（三级层次），发现现有模型在坐标一致性和视觉记忆维持上存在显著瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在静态视觉-空间推理上表现良好，但在具身场景中，模型需要根据自我中心观察持续修正空间信念，这要求长时间跨度的空间连贯性，而现有模型在此方面严重不足。本文旨在构建一个诊断基准，系统性地隔离和评估空间信念演化的核心机制。
AI.method: 构建SpaMEM基准：（1）基于物理引擎生成10,601,392张高保真图像（RGB、深度、实例、语义分割），来自1,000个程序化生成房屋中的25,000+交互序列；（2）设计三级层次化空间推理任务（共15个）：Level 1单视角原子空间感知、Level 2基于文本状态历史的时序推理、Level 3端到端原始视觉流信念维护；（3）分别评估短期（逐步）更新和长期（情节级）重建能力。
AI.result: 开源VLM系列模型在SpaMEM上表现出一致的堆叠瓶颈：坐标一致性接地是硬天花板；从Level 2到Level 3的显著性能下降暴露了明显的符号脚手架依赖——模型依赖文本式簿记取得成功，但在维持鲁棒的视觉记忆上极为困难。
AI.conclusion: SpaMEM为具身空间推理提供了细粒度的诊断标准，揭示了现有模型在状态表示、信念修正和长程情节集成上的根本缺陷，亟需引入显式机制来克服这些瓶颈。

title: Robust Fuzzy local k-plane clustering with mixture distance of hinge loss and L1 norm
summary: K-plane clustering (KPC), hyperplane clustering, and mixture regression all essentially fall within the same class of problems. This problem can be conceptualized as clustering in relatively high-dimensional K subspaces or K linear manifolds. Traditional KPC or fuzzy KPC models demonstrate a pronounced susceptibility to outliers, as they presuppose that the projection distance between data points and the plane normal vector adheres to the L2 distance. Meanwhile, the assumption of infinitely extending clusters adversely affects clustering performance. To solve these problems, this paper proposed a new robust fuzzy local k-plane clustering (RFLkPC) method that combines the mixture distance of hinge loss and L1 norm. The RFLkPC model assumes that each plane cluster is bounded to a finite area, which can flexibly and robustly handle plane clustering tasks with outliers or not. The corresponding model and optimization algorithms of RFLkPC were provided. Compared to other related models on this topic, a large number of experiments verify the efficiency of RFLkPC on simulated data and real data. The source code for the proposed RFLkPC method is publicly available at https://github.com/xuelin-xie/RFLkPC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒模糊局部k平面聚类方法（RFLkPC），通过结合Hinge损失和L1范数的混合距离，并假设每个平面簇有界，有效解决了传统K平面聚类对异常值敏感和簇无限延伸的问题，在模拟和真实数据上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统K平面聚类（KPC）和模糊KPC模型存在两个主要缺陷：一是假设数据点到平面法向量的投影距离服从L2距离，导致对异常值高度敏感；二是假设簇无限延伸，损害了聚类性能。因此，需要一种更鲁棒的聚类方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出鲁棒模糊局部k平面聚类（RFLkPC）方法，核心创新包括：（1）结合Hinge损失和L1范数的混合距离度量；（2）假设每个平面簇有界（有限区域），而非无限延伸；（3）在此基础上构建模型并设计相应的优化算法。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和真实数据上，与多种相关模型进行大量对比实验，验证了RFLkPC方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: RFLkPC方法能够灵活且鲁棒地处理带或不带异常值的平面聚类任务，代码已开源。

title: Dharma, Data and Deception: An LLM-Powered Rhetorical Analysis of Cow-Urine Health Claims on YouTube
summary: Health misinformation remains one of the most pressing challenges on social media, particularly when cultural traditions intersect with scientific-sounding claims. These dynamics are not only global but also deeply local, manifesting in culturally specific controversies that require careful analysis. Motivated by this, we examine 100 YouTube transcripts that promote or debunk cow urine (gomutra) as a health remedy, focusing on rhetorical strategies such as appeals to authority, efficacy appeals, and conspiracy framing. We employ large language models (LLMs) including GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and Mistral Medium 3 to annotate transcripts using a 14-category taxonomy of persuasive tactics. Our analysis reveals that promoters predominantly rely on efficacy appeals and social proof, while debunkers emphasize authority and rebuttal. Human evaluation of a subset of annotations yielded 90.1\% inter-annotator agreement, confirming the reliability of our taxonomy and validation process. This work advances computational methods for misinformation analysis and demonstrates how LLMs can support large-scale studies of cultural discourse online.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了100个关于牛尿健康功效的YouTube视频转录文本，利用多种大语言模型（GPT-4、GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Mistral Medium 3）按14类说服策略进行分类，发现支持者主要使用功效诉求和社会证明，反驳者则强调权威和驳斥策略。人类评估显示90.1%的标注一致性。
AI.motivation: 健康 misinformation 在社交媒体上是一个严峻挑战，尤其是当文化传统与看似科学的说法交织时。这种动态既有全球性也有地方性，表现在特定文化争议中，需要细致分析。
AI.method: 收集100个关于牛尿（gomutra）作为健康疗法的YouTube视频转录文本，使用GPT-4、GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Mistral Medium 3等多种大语言模型，按14类说服策略分类进行标注。分析支持者和反驳者所使用的修辞策略（权威诉求、功效诉求、阴谋框架等）。
AI.result: 支持者主要依赖功效诉求和社会证明策略；反驳者则强调权威和驳斥策略。人类评估子集标注达到90.1%的标注者间一致性，验证了分类体系和验证过程的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推进了 misinformation 分析的计算方法，展示了大语言模型如何支持大规模在线文化话语研究。

title: NRGS: Neural Regularization for Robust 3D Semantic Gaussian Splatting
summary: We propose a neural regularization method that refines the noisy 3D semantic field produced by lifting multi-view inconsistent 2D features, in order to obtain an accurate and robust 3D semantic Gaussian Splatting. The 2D features extracted from vision foundation models suffer from multi-view inconsistency due to a lack of cross-view constraints. Lifting these inconsistent features directly into 3D Gaussians results in a noisy semantic field, which degrades the performance of downstream tasks. Previous methods either focus on obtaining consistent multi-view features in the preprocessing stage or aim to mitigate noise through improved optimization strategies, often at the cost of increased preprocessing time or expensive computational overhead. In contrast, we introduce a variance-aware conditional MLP that operates directly on the 3D Gaussians, leveraging their geometric and appearance attributes to correct semantic errors in 3D space. Experiments on different datasets show that our method enhances the accuracy of lifted semantics, providing an efficient and effective approach to robust 3D semantic Gaussian Splatting.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于方差条件MLP的神经正则化方法，直接作用于3D高斯体来修正因2D特征多视图不一致导致的语义场噪声，实现准确鲁棒的3D语义高斯泼溅。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将视觉基础模型提取的多视图不一致2D特征直接提升到3D高斯体中，导致语义场存在噪声，影响下游任务性能。已有预处理或优化策略往往带来额外计算开销。
AI.method: 提出一种方差感知的条件MLP，直接作用于3D高斯体，利用其几何和外观属性来修正3D空间中的语义错误，无需额外的预处理或复杂优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法提升了提升后语义的准确性，为鲁棒的3D语义高斯泼溅提供了高效有效的方案。
AI.conclusion: 直接对3D高斯体进行语义正则化是一种高效且有效的途径，能够在不增加预处理时间和高计算开销的前提下，显著提升语义场的质量。

title: Hidden Failure Modes of Gradient Modification under Adam in Continual Learning, and Adaptive Decoupled Moment Routing as a Repair
summary:
Many continual-learning methods modify gradients upstream (e.g., projection, penalty rescaling, replay mixing) while treating Adam as a neutral backend. We show this composition has a hidden failure mode. In a high-overlap, non-adaptive 8-domain continual LM, all shared-routing projection baselines collapse close to vanilla forgetting (12.5--12.8 vs. 13.2). A 0.5% replay buffer is the strongest shared alternative but still reaches 11.6, while fixed-strength decoupling falls below vanilla at 14.1. Only adaptive decoupled routing remains stable at 9.4, improving over vanilla by 3.8 units. On a 16-domain stream, its gain over the strongest shared-routing projection baseline grows to 4.5--4.8 units. The failure is largely invisible on clean benchmarks.
  We explain this effect through Adam's second-moment pathway: in the tested regime, projection induces a 1/(1-alpha) inflation of the old-direction effective learning rate, matching measurements within 8% across eight alpha values. The same conflict appears with penalty methods, replay mixing, and at 7B scale under LoRA. Our fix routes the modified gradient only to the first moment while preserving magnitude-faithful second-moment statistics, with overlap-aware adaptive strength. This simple change is the only tested configuration that consistently avoids collapse across methods, optimizers, and scale.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了持续学习方法（如梯度投影、惩罚重缩放、回放混合）与Adam优化器组合时的隐藏失败模式：在非自适应持续语言模型中，投影方法几乎退化为普通遗忘（12.5-12.8 vs 13.2），而自适应解耦路由保持稳定（9.4）。原因是投影操作导致Adam第二动量路径下旧方向有效学习率膨胀1/(1-α)倍。通过仅将修改梯度路由到一阶矩并保持二阶矩统计量真实，加上重叠感知的自适应强度，可避免崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法将Adam视为中性后端，忽略了梯度修改与Adam二阶动量的交互可能导致隐藏的失败模式，尤其在非自适应、高重叠的持续语言模型场景中。
AI.method: 提出仅将修改后的梯度路由到Adam的一阶矩，同时保持二阶矩统计量忠实反映真实梯度幅度，并引入重叠感知的自适应强度。
AI.result: 在8域持续LM中，自适应解耦路由稳定在9.4（优于vanilla 3.8单位），而投影方法接近遗忘（12.5-12.8）。在16域流中，优势扩大到4.5-4.8单位。在7B规模LoRA下同样有效。
AI.conclusion: 梯度修改与Adam二阶动量的冲突是持续学习中的一个普遍失败模式，所提修复是唯一一致避免崩溃的配置。

title: From graphemic dependence to lexical structure: a Markovian perspective on Dante's Commedia
comment: 25 pages, 8 figures, 1 supplementary material; submitted to Digital Scholarship in the Humanities
summary:
This study investigates the structural organisation of Dante's Divina Commedia through a symbolic representation based on vowel-consonant (V/C) encoding. Modelling the resulting sequence as a four-state Markov chain yields a parsimonious index of graphemic memory, capturing the balance between persistence and alternation patterns.
  Across the poem, this index exhibits a slight but consistent increase from the Inferno to the Paradiso, indicating a directional shift in local dependency structure. Trigram-level analysis shows that this trend is driven by a restricted set of recurrent configurations, interpreted as graphemic probes linking the Markov representation to identifiable lexical environments in the text.
  These probes display distinct behaviours: configurations involving two transitions more frequently emerge across word boundaries, reflecting interactions between adjacent tokens, whereas configurations with fewer transitions are largely confined to intra-lexical structures. Part of the signal is further shaped by orthographic phenomena, particularly apostrophised forms, highlighting the role of writing conventions alongside phonological and lexical organisation.
  A complementary classification analysis identifies cantica-specific terms, providing lexical anchors through which graphemic probes can be related to the structure of the poem. This organisation is reflected not only in the separation of the three cantiche, but also in a continuous trajectory across the text.
  Overall, the results show that simple probabilistic models applied to symbolic text representations can uncover structured interactions between local dependencies, lexical distribution, orthographic encoding, and large-scale organisation, providing an interpretable framework for linking local symbolic dynamics to higher-level textual organisation.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过元音-辅音编码将但丁《神曲》转化为符号序列，并利用四状态马尔可夫链建模，发现从《地狱篇》到《天堂篇》的图素记忆指数呈递增趋势。三字母组分析揭示了驱动这一趋势的核心配置（图素探针），这些探针在词内/跨词边界呈现不同行为，并受到书写惯例（如撇号形式）影响。分类分析进一步识别出各篇章特有词汇，将图素探针与诗歌宏观结构联系起来。
AI.motivation: 探索简单的概率模型（马尔可夫链）能否从文本的底层符号编码（元音-辅音序列）中揭示出诗歌的宏观结构组织，建立局部符号动态与高层文本组织之间的可解释联系。
AI.method: 1) 将《神曲》文本按元音(V)/辅音(C)编码为符号序列；2) 建模为四状态马尔可夫链，计算图素记忆指数；3) 进行三字母组级分析识别驱动趋势的核心配置（图素探针）；4) 分类分析识别各篇章特有词汇，建立探针与词汇锚点的关联。
AI.result: 1) 图素记忆指数从《地狱篇》到《天堂篇》呈轻微但一致的递增趋势；2) 核心配置（图素探针）驱动了这一趋势，其中含两次转移的配置更多出现在词边界，转移较少的配置多限于词内结构；3) 书写惯例（特别是撇号形式）对信号有显著影响；4) 各篇章特有词汇可作为图素探针的词汇锚点。
AI.conclusion: 简单的概率模型应用于符号化文本表征，能够揭示局部依赖性、词汇分布、正字法编码与宏观组织之间的结构化互动，为连接局部符号动态与更高层次文本组织提供了一个可解释的分析框架。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: All Eyes on the Workflow: Automated and Efficient Event Discovery from Video Streams
summary: Disciplines such as business process management and process mining aid organizations by discovering insights about processes on the basis of recorded event data. However, an obstacle to process analysis is data multi-modality: for instance, data in video form are not directly interpretable as events. In this work, we present SnapLog, an approach to extract event data from videos by converting frames to feature vectors using image embeddings and performing temporal segmentation through frame-wise similarity matrices. A generalized few-shot classification is then used to assign labels to the video segments, yielding labeled, timestamped sub-sequences of frames that are interpretable as events. Conventional process mining techniques can be used to analyze the resulting data. We show that our approach produces logs that accurately reflect the process in the videos.

AI.tldr: SnapLog方法通过图像嵌入和时序分割，从视频中提取事件数据，使其可用于流程挖掘分析，实验证明能准确反映视频中的流程。
AI.motivation: 业务流程管理和流程挖掘领域面临数据多模态的障碍，特别是视频数据无法直接作为事件数据被解释和分析。
AI.method: 利用图像嵌入将视频帧转换为特征向量，通过帧间相似性矩阵进行时序分割，再采用广义少样本分类对视频片段进行标签分配，生成带有时间戳的事件序列。
AI.result: 该方法生成的日志能够准确反映视频中的流程。
AI.conclusion: SnapLog成功将非结构化的视频数据转化为结构化的事件日志，使得传统流程挖掘技术得以应用，为多模态流程分析提供了新途径。

title: Distance-Misaligned Training in Graph Transformers and Adaptive Graph-Aware Control
comment: Accepted by Graph Signal Processing Workshop 2026 as an extended abstract
summary: Graph Transformers can mix information globally, but this flexibility also creates failure modes: some tasks require long-range communication while others are better served by local interaction. We study this through a synthetic node-classification benchmark on contextual stochastic block model graphs, where labels are generated by a controllable mixture of local and far-shell signals. We define distance-misaligned training as a mismatch between where label-relevant information lies and where the model allocates communication over graph distance. On this benchmark, we find three points. First, the preferred graph-distance bias changes systematically with task locality. Second, an oracle adaptive controller, given offline access to the task-side distance target, nearly matches the best fixed bias across regimes and strongly improves over a neutral baseline on mixed and local tasks. Third, a task-agnostic zero-gap controller is weaker, indicating that adaptation alone is not enough and that the control target matters. These results suggest that distance-resolved diagnosis is useful for understanding Graph Transformer failures and for designing graph-aware control.

AI.tldr: 本文通过合成节点分类基准研究了图Transformer中距离偏差（长程vs局部通信）与任务需求不匹配导致的失败模式，发现任务局部性决定最佳偏差，且离线自适应控制器能显著改善性能，但零差距控制器效果有限，表明距离感知诊断和控制目标设计的重要性。
AI.motivation: 图Transformer能够全局混合信息，但这种灵活性也带来了失败模式：某些任务需要长程通信，而另一些任务更适合局部交互。作者希望系统性地研究这一现象，即标签相关信息所在位置与模型在图上分配通信距离之间的不匹配问题。
AI.method: 在上下文随机块模型图上构建合成节点分类基准，标签由可控的局部信号和远壳信号混合生成。定义了"距离错位训练"作为标签相关信息与模型通信分配之间的不匹配。设计了两种控制器：离线自适应控制器（有任务侧距离目标）和零差距控制器（任务不可知）。
AI.result: 1）图距离偏差偏好随任务局部性系统性变化；2）离线自适应控制器（有距离目标）几乎匹配各机制下的最佳固定偏差，在混合和局部任务上相比中性基线显著改进；3）任务不可知的零差距控制器效果较弱。
AI.conclusion: 距离分辨诊断有助于理解图Transformer的失败模式，设计图感知的控制信号很重要——仅靠自适应不够，控制目标本身也很关键。

title: Identifying and typifying demographic unfairness in phoneme-level embeddings of self-supervised speech recognition models
summary: Modern automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems have been observed to function better for certain speaker groups (SGs) than others, despite recent gains in overall performance. One potential impediment to progress towards fairer ASR is a more nuanced understanding of the types of modeling errors that speech encoder models make, and in particular the difference between the structure of embeddings for high-performance and low-performance SGs. This paper proposes a framework typifying two types of error that can occur in modeling phonemes in ASR systems: random error/high variance in phoneme embedding, vs systematic error/embedding bias. We find that training phoneme classification probes only on a single, typically disadvantaged SG, sometimes improves performance for that SG, which is evidence for the existence of SG-level bias in phoneme embeddings. On the other hand, we find that speakers and SGs with higher levels of phoneme variance are the same as those with worse phoneme prediction accuracy. We conclude that both types of error are present in phoneme embeddings and both are candidate causes for SG-level unfairness in ASR, though random error is likely a greater hindrance to fairness than systematic error. Furthermore, we find that finetuning encoder models using a fairness-enhancing algorithm (domain enhancing and adversarial training) changes neither the benefits of in-domain phoneme classification probe training, nor measured levels of random embedding error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，区分了ASR系统中音素嵌入的两种错误类型：随机误差（高方差）和系统误差（嵌入偏置）。研究发现，仅对弱势说话人群体训练音素分类探针可提升该群体性能，表明存在群体级偏置；同时，高方差群体也是预测准确率低的群体。结论是两种错误均存在，随机误差对公平性的阻碍更大，且公平性增强微调方法无法改变这两种错误。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统对某些说话人群体的性能较差，但缺乏对语音编码器嵌入层错误类型的细致理解，特别是高性能与低性能群体之间嵌入结构的差异。
AI.method: 提出一个框架将ASR音素建模错误分为两类：随机误差（高方差）和系统误差（嵌入偏置）。通过仅在单一弱势说话人群体上训练音素分类探针，比较其性能变化来识别群体级偏置；同时分析不同群体音素嵌入的方差与预测准确率的关联。
AI.result: 仅在弱势群体上训练探针可提升该群体性能（表明存在系统偏置）；高方差群体与低预测准确率群体一致（表明存在随机误差）；公平性增强微调（领域增强与对抗训练）无法改变探针训练收益和随机误差水平。
AI.conclusion: ASR音素嵌入中同时存在随机误差和系统误差，两者均可能导致说话人群体层面的不公平性，但随机误差（高方差）是更大的障碍。现有公平性增强方法无法有效缓解这两类错误。

title: Contrastive Semantic Projection: Faithful Neuron Labeling with Contrastive Examples
summary: Neuron labeling assigns textual descriptions to internal units of deep networks. Existing approaches typically rely on highly activating examples, often yielding broad or misleading labels by focusing on dominant but incidental visual factors. Prior work such as FALCON introduced contrastive examples -- inputs that are semantically similar to activating examples but elicit low activations -- to sharpen explanations, but it primarily addresses subspace-level interpretability rather than scalable neuron-level labeling. We revisit contrastive explanations for neuron-level labeling in two stages: (1) candidate label generation with vision language models (VLMs) and (2) label assignment with CLIP-like encoders. First, we show that providing contrastive image sets to VLMs yields candidate labels that are more specific and more faithful. Second, we introduce Contrastive Semantic Projection (CSP), an extension of SemanticLens that incorporates contrastive examples directly into its CLIP-based scoring and selection pipeline. Across extensive experiments and a case study on melanoma detection, contrastive labeling improves both faithfulness and semantic granularity over state-of-the-art baselines. Our results demonstrate that contrastive examples are a simple yet powerful and currently underutilized component of neuron labeling and analysis pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比示例的神经元标注方法，通过对比激活示例与非激活示例，利用VLM生成候选标签并用CLIP编码器进行评分，显著提升了标注的忠实度和语义粒度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经元标注方法依赖高激活示例，容易产生宽泛或误导性标签。FALCON虽引入对比示例但主要针对子空间解释性，缺乏可扩展的神经元级标注方法。本文旨在利用对比示例改进神经元级标签的准确性和特异性。
AI.method: 两阶段流程：(1) 候选标签生成——向VLM提供对比图像集（高激活+低激活示例），生成更具体、更忠实的候选标签；(2) 标签分配——提出Contrastive Semantic Projection (CSP)，扩展SemanticLens，将对比示例直接融入CLIP打分与选择流程。
AI.result: 在广泛实验和黑色素瘤检测案例研究中，对比标注方法在忠实度和语义粒度上均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比示例是神经元标注与分析流程中简单而强大、但目前尚未充分利用的组件。

title: From Local to Cluster: A Unified Framework for Causal Discovery with Latent Variables
summary: Latent variables pose a fundamental challenge to causal discovery and inference. Conventional local methods focus on direct neighbors but fail to provide macro level insights. Cluster level methods enable macro causal reasoning but either assume clusters are known a priori or require causal sufficiency. Moreover, directly applying single variable causal discovery methods to cluster level problems violates causal sufficiency and leads to incorrect results. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes L2C (Local to Cluster Causal Abstraction), a unified framework that bridges local structure learning and cluster level causal discovery. Unlike prior work that requires a complete manual assignment of micro variables to clusters, L2C discovers the partition automatically from local causal patterns. Our solution leverages a cluster reduction theorem to reduce any cluster to at most three nodes without loss of causal information, applies local causal discovery to identify direct causes, effects, and V structures in the presence of latent variables, and performs macro level causal inference via cluster level calculus on the learned cluster graph. L2C does not assume causal sufficiency, as latent variables are handled through local discovery. Theoretical analysis shows that L2C ensures soundness, atomic completeness, and computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real world data demonstrate that L2C accurately recovers ground truth clusters and achieves superior macro causal effect identification compared to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出L2C框架，通过局部结构学习自动发现变量聚类，并在聚类层面进行因果推断，无需因果充分性假设。
AI.motivation: 现有局部方法只关注直接邻居，缺乏宏观视角；聚类方法要么需要预知聚类，要么假设因果充分性。直接对聚类变量应用单变量因果发现会违反因果充分性，导致错误结果。
AI.method: 提出L2C框架：利用聚类归约定理将任意聚类归约为最多三个节点；应用局部因果发现识别存在潜变量时的直接原因、效应和V结构；通过聚类层面演算进行宏观因果推断。
AI.result: 理论分析证明L2C具有可靠性、原子完备性和计算效率；合成和真实数据实验表明L2C准确恢复真实聚类，并在宏观因果效应识别上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: L2C提供了一个从局部到聚类的统一因果抽象框架，无需因果充分性假设，自动发现变量聚类，实现高效的宏观因果推理。

title: BERAG: Bayesian Ensemble Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering
summary: A common approach to question answering with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is to concatenate documents into a single context and pass it to a language model to generate an answer. While simple, this strategy can obscure the contribution of individual documents, making attribution difficult and contributing to the ``lost-in-the-middle'' effect, where relevant information in long contexts is overlooked. Concatenation also scales poorly: computational cost grows quadratically with context length, a problem that becomes especially severe when the context includes visual data, as in visual question answering. Attempts to mitigate these issues by limiting context length can further restrict performance by preventing models from benefiting from the improved recall offered by deeper retrieval. We propose Bayesian Ensemble Retrieval-Augmented Generation (BERAG), along with Bayesian Ensemble Fine-Tuning (BEFT), as a RAG framework in which language models are conditioned on individual retrieved documents rather than a single combined context. BERAG treats document posterior probabilities as ensemble weights and updates them token by token using Bayes' rule during generation. This approach enables probabilistic re-ranking, parallel memory usage, and clear attribution of document contribution, making it well-suited for large document collections. We evaluate BERAG and BEFT primarily on knowledge-based visual question answering tasks, where models must reason over long, imperfect retrieval lists. The results show substantial improvements over standard RAG, including strong gains on Document Visual Question Answering and multimodal needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks. We also demonstrate that BERAG mitigates the ``lost-in-the-middle'' effect. The document posterior can be used to detect insufficient grounding and trigger deflection, while document pruning enables faster decoding than standard RAG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BERAG和BEFT框架，通过贝叶斯集成方式分别处理检索到的文档，而非简单拼接，有效缓解了RAG中的“lost-in-the-middle”效应、计算成本高和归因困难等问题，在视觉问答任务上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG将检索文档拼接后输入语言模型，存在三大问题：（1）归因困难，难以区分各文档的贡献；（2）“lost-in-the-middle”效应，中间位置的相关信息被忽略；（3）计算成本随上下文长度呈二次增长，视觉数据场景下尤为严重。限制上下文长度又会牺牲检索召回率。
AI.method: 提出Bayesian Ensemble RAG (BERAG) 及其微调版本BEFT。核心思想是将语言模型分别条件于单个检索文档，而非拼接后的上下文。在生成过程中，逐token使用贝叶斯规则更新文档的后验概率作为集成权重，实现概率重排、并行记忆和文档归因。
AI.result: 在知识型视觉问答任务上进行了评估，在Document VQA和多模态needle-in-a-haystack基准测试上相比标准RAG有显著提升。同时证明了BERAG能缓解"lost-in-the-middle"效应，文档后验概率可用于检测证据不足并触发拒答，文档剪枝还能实现比标准RAG更快的解码速度。
AI.conclusion: BERAG框架通过贝叶斯集成策略，在不牺牲检索深度的前提下解决了标准RAG的拼接问题，为问答系统提供了更高效、可归因、可扩展的替代方案。

title: Improving Driver Drowsiness Detection via Personalized EAR/MAR Thresholds and CNN-Based Classification
summary: Driver drowsiness is a major cause of traffic accidents worldwide, posing a serious threat to public safety. Vision-based driver monitoring systems often rely on fixed Eye Aspect Ratio (EAR) and Mouth Aspect Ratio (MAR) thresholds; however, such fixed values frequently fail to generalize across individuals due to variations in facial structure, illumination, and driving conditions. This paper proposes a personalized driver drowsiness detection system that monitors eyelid movements, head position, and yawning behavior in real time and provides warnings when signs of fatigue are detected. The system employs driver-specific EAR and MAR thresholds, calibrated before driving, to improve classical metric-based detection. In addition, deep learning-based Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models are integrated to enhance accuracy in challenging scenarios. The system is evaluated using publicly available datasets as well as a custom dataset collected under diverse lighting conditions, head poses, and user characteristics. Experimental results show that personalized thresholding improves detection accuracy by 2-3% compared to fixed thresholds, while CNN-based classification achieves 99.1% accuracy for eye state detection and 98.8% for yawning detection, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining classical metrics with deep learning for robust real-time driver monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种个性化驾驶员疲劳检测系统，结合个性化EAR/MAR阈值与CNN深度学习模型，在多种条件下实现高精度实时监测，眼状态检测准确率达99.1%，哈欠检测达98.8%。
AI.motivation: 传统基于固定EAR/MAR阈值的驾驶员疲劳检测方法因个体面部结构、光照和驾驶条件差异而泛化能力差，亟需一种能够适应个体差异的鲁棒检测方案。
AI.method: 系统结合两种策略：(1) 个性化阈值校准——在驾驶前针对每个驾驶员校准专属EAR和MAR阈值；(2) CNN深度学习模型——用于眼状态和哈欠检测，以提升复杂场景下的精度。系统同时监测眼睑运动、头部位置和打哈欠行为。
AI.result: 个性化阈值相比固定阈值提升2-3%检测精度；CNN模型实现眼状态检测99.1%准确率、哈欠检测98.8%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 将经典度量方法与深度学习相结合，能够在真实驾驶场景中实现鲁棒、实时的个性化疲劳监测，有效提升道路安全。

title: Beyond Land Surface Temperature: Explainable Spatial Machine Learning Reveals Urban Morphology Effects on Human-Centric Heat Stress
summary: Heat exposure connects the built environment and public health, directly shaping the livability and sustainability of urban areas. Understanding the spatial heterogeneity of heat exposure and its drivers is vital for climate-adaptive urban planning. However, most planning-oriented studies rely on land surface temperature (LST), and whether LST adequately represents human heat exposure and how it differs from physiologically relevant heat stress remains insufficiently examined. Here, adopting Landsat-retrieved 30-m LST and GPU-accelerated 1-m universal thermal climate index (UTCI) in Singapore, this study establishes a comprehensive "Modeling-Comparing-Assessing" framework to systematically evaluate the spatial and mechanistic discrepancies between the two metrics. We further investigate pronounced non-stationary and threshold-based quantitative relationships of the two metrics with urban factors by employing a novel geographically weighted XGBoost (GW-XGBoost) and generalized additive model (GAM) workflow. Our results demonstrate notable discrepancies in spatial patterns of LST and UTCI, along with substantial spatial heterogeneity in how 2D and 3D urban factors impact these two thermal metrics, as revealed by explainable GW-XGBoost models (global out-of-bag R2 = 0.855 for LST and 0.905 for UTCI, respectively). Crucially, spatially explicit SHAP interprets that sky view factor plays a central role in explaining UTCI variability but exhibits a comparatively marginal independent contribution to LST, indicating that LST inadequately captures shading-driven and radiative processes governing actual human heat stress. Notably, SHAP-GAM analysis indicates that higher albedo is associated with increased UTCI. These novel findings provide evidence for integrating physiologically relevant thermal indices to inform targeted heat risk management and climate-adaptive urban planning.

AI.tldr: 该研究在新加坡建立“建模-比较-评估”框架，系统比较了地表温度（LST）与生理相关热指数（UTCI）在空间格局和驱动因素上的差异，发现两者存在显著不一致，其中天空视角因子对UTCI影响大而对LST影响小，且高反照率反而增加UTCI，为气候适应性城市规划提供了新依据。
AI.motivation: 现有城市规划研究多依赖地表温度（LST）来评估热暴露，但LST能否充分代表人体实际热应激尚不清楚，且二者与城市因素的差异机制缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 采用Landsat 30米LST和GPU加速的1米UTCI数据，建立“建模-比较-评估”框架；利用地理加权XGBoost（GW-XGBoost）和广义加性模型（GAM）分析非平稳和阈值效应关系。
AI.result: LST与UTCI在空间格局上存在显著差异；GW-XGBoost模型全局R²分别为0.855（LST）和0.905（UTCI）；天空视角因子对UTCI贡献大但对LST贡献小；高反照率与UTCI升高相关。
AI.conclusion: LST无法充分捕捉影响人体实际热应激的遮阴和辐射过程，需整合生理相关热指数以指导热风险管理和气候适应性城市规划。

title: CRAFT: Clustered Regression for Adaptive Filtering of Training data
summary: Selecting a small, high-quality subset from a large corpus for fine-tuning is increasingly important as corpora grow to tens of millions of datapoints, making full fine-tuning expensive and often unnecessary. We propose CRAFT (Clustered Regression for Adaptive Filtering of Training data), a vectorization-agnostic selection method for training sequence-to-sequence models. CRAFT decomposes the joint source-target distribution and performs a two-stage selection: (i) match the validation source distribution through proportional budget allocation across k-means clusters, and (ii) within each source cluster, select training pairs whose target embeddings minimize a conditional expected distance derived from the validation target distribution. We prove that proportional cluster allocation bounds the continuous KL divergence between selected and validation distributions, with the residual controlled by cluster diameters. We evaluate CRAFT on English-Hindi translation by selecting training data from 33 million NLLB sentence pairs and fine-tuning mBART via LoRA. CRAFT achieves 43.34 BLEU, outperforming TSDS (41.21) by 2.13 points on the same candidate pool and encoder while completing selection over 40 times faster. With TF-IDF vectorization, the entire pipeline completes in under one minute on CPU. TAROT achieves 45.61 BLEU, but CRAFT completes selection in 26.86 seconds versus TAROT's 75.6 seconds, a 2.8 time speedup.

AI.tldr: 提出CRAFT方法，通过聚类回归自适应过滤训练数据，在英-印翻译任务上以43.34 BLEU超越基线，选择速度比TAROT快2.8倍。
AI.motivation: 随着语料库规模增长到数千万条数据，全量微调成本高昂且往往不必要，需要一种高效的数据选择方法来选出高质量子集。
AI.method: 提出CRAFT：两阶段选择策略。(i) 通过k-means聚类分配预算以匹配验证集源分布；(ii) 在每个源聚类内，选择目标嵌入最小化条件期望距离的训练对。同时证明比例聚类分配能约束所选分布与验证分布之间的连续KL散度。
AI.result: 在英-印翻译任务上，CRAFT在3300万NLLB句子对中选出子集微调mBART，BLEU达43.34，超过TSDS（41.21）2.13分，选择速度快40倍以上；用TF-IDF向量化时整个流程在CPU上不到1分钟完成；相比TAROT（45.61 BLEU），选择速度从75.6秒降至26.86秒，加速2.8倍。
AI.conclusion: CRAFT是一种向量化无关的高效数据选择方法，在保持甚至提升模型性能的同时大幅降低选择时间，适用于大规模语料库的序列到序列模型训练数据筛选。

title: Holo360D: A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset with Continuous Trajectories for Advancing Panoramic 3D Reconstruction and Beyond
summary: While feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have advanced rapidly, they still exhibit degraded performance on panoramas due to spherical distortions. Moreover, existing panoramic 3D datasets are predominantly collected with 360 cameras fixed at discrete locations, resulting in discontinuous trajectories. These limitations critically hinder the development of panoramic feed-forward 3D reconstruction, especially for the multi-view setting. In this paper, we present Holo360D, a comprehensive dataset containing 109,495 panoramas paired with registered point clouds, meshes, and aligned camera poses. To our knowledge, Holo360D is the first large-scale dataset that provides continuous panoramic sequences with accurately aligned high-completeness depth maps. The raw data are initially collected using a 3D laser scanner coupled with a 360 camera. Subsequently, the raw data are processed with both online and offline SLAM systems. Furthermore, to enhance the 3D data quality, a post-processing pipeline tailored for the 360 dataset is proposed, including geometry denoising, mesh hole filling, and region-specific remeshing. Finally, we establish a new benchmark by fine-tuning 3D reconstruction models on Holo360D, providing key insights into effective fine-tuning strategies. Our results demonstrate that Holo360D delivers superior training signals and provides a comprehensive benchmark for advancing panoramic 3D reconstruction models. Datasets and Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: Holo360D是一个包含109,495张全景图像的大规模数据集，提供连续全景序列、对齐点云/网格和相机位姿，专为推进全景3D重建研究而设计。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建模型在全景图上性能不佳（因球面畸变），且现有全景3D数据集多为离散位置采集，缺乏连续轨迹，严重制约了多视图全景3D重建的发展。
AI.method: 使用3D激光扫描仪+360相机采集原始数据，经在线和离线SLAM系统处理，再通过后处理管线（几何去噪、网格孔洞填充、区域特定重网格化）提升质量，最后在数据集上微调3D重建模型建立基准。
AI.result: Holo360D提供了优越的训练信号，建立了全面的基准，为全景3D重建模型的有效微调策略提供了关键见解。
AI.conclusion: Holo360D作为首个大规模连续全景序列数据集，能有效推动全景3D重建模型的发展，数据集和代码将公开。

title: HubRouter: A Pluggable Sub-Quadratic Routing Primitive for Hybrid Sequence Models
summary:
We introduce HubRouter, a pluggable module that replaces O(n^2) attention layers with O(nM) hub-mediated routing, where M << n is a small number of learned hub tokens. We demonstrate it in two from-scratch architectures: a Jamba-style hybrid and a 12-layer Transformer; retrofit into pretrained models is a tested negative case. HubRouter implements an encode-decode-score-council pipeline: M learned hubs cross-attend to all tokens, tokens project against hubs for routing fingerprints, a score head selects top-k tokens, and a sparse council attends only to the selected subset.
  We validate HubRouter in three settings. (1) Hub-Jamba yields a nominal 4.2% PPL improvement (200.2 vs 209.0, single seed; possibly within seed noise) and up to ~90x training throughput at sequence length 1024 in matched PyTorch-native baselines; an optimised baseline would narrow this to ~10-15x. (2) Graduated replacement of 25% of Transformer attention layers gives the best perplexity in our matched-budget sweep (268.0 vs 282.4 pure Transformer). (3) Hub-GPT provides strictly causal routing, achieving PPL 211.5 +/- 0.4 over 3 seeds (post council-causal fix); approximately 3 PPL worse than Jamba's 208.5 +/- 0.7, a measurable quality cost for avoiding O(n^2) computation. Post-fix, chunk size C has little effect; the pre-fix chunk-size benefit was an artifact of a bidirectional-council leak we found in adversarial review.
  A multi-seed hub-count sweep (~105 runs across M=1-32) reveals M=8-14 as the reliably-converging sub-band (4-5/5 seeds); M=6 is rescued to 5/5 by orthogonal regularization, while M>=20 shows increasing seed sensitivity. Companion paper arXiv:2603.20997 (Basu, 2026) defines the routing diagnostic task. Code and scripts will be released.

AI.tldr: HubRouter提出用O(nM)的hub路由机制替代O(n²)的自注意力层，通过可学习的hub token实现稀疏注意力，在多种架构中验证了其效率与质量权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer的O(n²)自注意力机制在处理长序列时计算开销过大，作者希望设计一种可插拔的替代方案，在不显著牺牲质量的前提下大幅提升训练吞吐量。
AI.method: HubRouter采用"编码-解码-打分-议会"四阶段流程：(1) M个可学习hub token对所有token做交叉注意力；(2) token投影到hub空间生成路由指纹；(3) 选择头选出top-k token；(4) 稀疏议会仅关注选中的子集。支持因果路由（Hub-GPT）和双向路由（Hub-Jamba）。
AI.result: (1) Hub-Jamba在序列长度1024下达到约90x训练吞吐量（优化后基线约10-15x），PPL微升4.2%（可能处于种子噪声范围内）；(2) 混合25% HubRouter层在匹配预算下PPL最优（268.0 vs 282.4）；(3) Hub-GPT因果路由PPL 211.5，比Jamba差约3 PPL；(4) hub数量M=8-14为可靠收敛区间。
AI.conclusion: HubRouter是O(n²)注意力的有效替代方案，在大幅提升效率的同时保持可接受的质量。双向路由（Jamba风格）表现优于严格因果路由。最佳hub数量为8-14，过大或过小都影响稳定性。

title: Thinking Without Words: Efficient Latent Reasoning with Abstract Chain-of-Thought
summary: While long, explicit chains-of-thought (CoT) have proven effective on complex reasoning tasks, they are costly to generate during inference. Non-verbal reasoning methods have emerged with shorter generation lengths by leveraging continuous representations, yet their performance lags behind verbalized CoT. We propose $\textbf{Abstract Chain-of-Thought}$, a discrete latent reasoning post-training mechanism in which the language model produces a short sequence of tokens from a reserved vocabulary in lieu of a natural language CoT, before generating a response. To make previously unseen ''abstract'' tokens useful, we introduce a policy iteration-style warm-up loop that alternates between (i.) bottlenecking from a verbal CoT via masking and performing supervised fine-tuning, and (ii.) self-distillation by training the model to generate abstract tokens from the prompt alone via constrained decoding with the codebook. After warm-up, we optimize the generation of abstract sequences with warm-started reinforcement learning under constrained decoding. Abstract-CoT achieves up to $11.6\times$ fewer reasoning tokens while demonstrating comparable performance across mathematical reasoning, instruction-following, and multi-hop reasoning, and generalizes across language model families. We also find an emergent power law distribution over the abstract vocabulary, akin to those seen in natural language, that evolves across the training phases. Our findings highlight the potential for post-training latent reasoning mechanisms that enable efficient inference through a learned abstract reasoning language.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Abstract Chain-of-Thought（抽象思维链），一种离散潜在推理后训练机制，模型使用保留词汇表中的短token序列替代自然语言CoT进行推理，通过策略迭代式预热循环（掩码瓶颈监督微调+自蒸馏）和强化学习优化，在减少高达11.6倍推理token的同时，在数学推理、指令遵循等多任务上保持可比性能。
AI.motivation: 长链式思维推理虽然有效，但推理时生成成本高；非语言推理方法虽然缩短了生成长度，但性能不如语言化CoT。作者希望在保持性能的同时大幅减少推理token数量。
AI.method: (1) 从保留词汇表中生成短token序列（抽象CoT）替代自然语言CoT；(2) 策略迭代预热循环：通过掩码从语言CoT中瓶颈化+监督微调，以及通过约束解码用码本自蒸馏；(3) 预热后用强化学习优化抽象序列生成。
AI.result: 推理token减少最多11.6倍；在数学推理、指令遵循、多跳推理等任务上性能与语言CoT相当；在不同语言模型家族上均有效；发现抽象词汇表上出现类似自然语言的幂律分布。
AI.conclusion: 后训练潜在推理机制通过习得的抽象推理语言能够实现高效推理，展示了离散潜在表征在推理中的潜力。

title: CGC: Compositional Grounded Contrast for Fine-Grained Multi-Image Understanding
summary: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced rapidly, they still face notable challenges in fine-grained multi-image understanding, often exhibiting spatial hallucination, attention leakage, and failures in object constancy. In addition, existing approaches typically rely on expensive human annotations or large-scale chain-of-thought (CoT) data generation. We propose Compositional Grounded Contrast (abbr. CGC), a low-cost full framework for boosting fine-grained multi-image understanding of MLLMs. Built on existing single-image grounding annotations, CGC constructs compositional multi-image training instances through Inter-Image Contrast and Intra-Image Contrast, which introduce semantically decoupled distractor contexts for cross-image discrimination and correlated cross-view samples for object constancy, respectively. CGC further introduces a Rule-Based Spatial Reward within the GRPO framework to improve source-image attribution, spatial alignment, and structured output validity under a Think-before-Grounding paradigm. Experiments show that CGC achieves state-of-the-art results on fine-grained multi-image benchmarks, including MIG-Bench and VLM2-Bench. The learned multi-image understanding capability also transfers to broader multimodal understanding and reasoning tasks, yielding consistent gains over the Qwen3-VL-8B base model on MathVista (+2.90), MuirBench (+2.88), MMStar (+1.93), MMMU (+1.77), and BLINK (+1.69).

AI.tldr: 本文提出CGC框架，通过跨图像对比、图像内对比和基于规则的空间奖励机制，低成本提升多模态大模型的多图像细粒度理解能力，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在多图像细粒度理解上面临空间幻觉、注意力泄露和对象恒常性失败等挑战，且依赖昂贵的人工标注或大规模思维链数据生成。
AI.method: 基于已有单图像标注数据，通过跨图像对比和图像内对比构建组合式多图像训练实例，引入基于规则的空间奖励与GRPO框架，采用"先思考再定位"范式。
AI.result: 在MIG-Bench和VLM2-Bench上达到SOTA，并在MathVista、MuirBench、MMStar、MMMU、BLINK等基准上相比Qwen3-VL-8B模型有一致提升。
AI.conclusion: CGC是一种低成本、有效的多图像细粒度理解增强框架，且学到的能力可迁移到更广泛的多模态理解和推理任务中。

title: Towards Adaptive Continual Model Merging via Manifold-Aware Expert Evolution
summary: Continual Model Merging (CMM) sequentially integrates task-specific models into a unified architecture without intensive retraining. However, existing CMM methods are hindered by a fundamental saturation-redundancy dilemma: backbone-centric approaches face parameter saturation and representation interference within fixed capacities, whereas Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) variants resort to indiscriminate expansion, incurring expert redundancy and a routing bottleneck reliant on additional data-driven optimization. To resolve these challenges, we propose MADE-IT (Manifold-Aware Dynamic Expert Evolution and Implicit rouTing), an adaptive CMM method that orchestrates expert management and activation by grounding intrinsic expert representations in manifold geometry. We introduce a projection-based subspace affinity metric coupled with a distribution-aware adaptive threshold mechanism to guide autonomous expert evolution, harmonizing diversity with architectural parsimony. Furthermore, to bypass parameterized gating networks, we design a data-free and training-free implicit routing mechanism that activates experts via feature-subspace alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MADE-IT consistently outperforms strong baselines in accuracy and robustness across long-horizon and shuffled task sequences, while significantly pruning redundant experts, particularly within generic modules and early layers.

AI.tldr: 提出MADE-IT方法，通过流形感知的动态专家演化和隐式路由机制，解决了持续模型融合中的饱和-冗余困境，在多个任务序列上实现了更优的准确率和鲁棒性，同时大幅精简冗余专家。
AI.motivation: 现有CMM方法面临饱和-冗余困境：骨干网络方法受限于固定容量，参数饱和导致表示干扰；MoE变体随意扩展带来专家冗余和路由瓶颈（依赖额外数据优化）。亟需一种自适应、轻量且无需额外数据驱动的专家管理与激活机制。
AI.method: 1) 基于投影的子空间亲和度指标 + 分布感知自适应阈值机制，引导专家自主演化，平衡多样性与结构精简；2) 数据无关、无需训练的隐式路由机制，通过特征-子空间对齐激活专家，避免参数化门控网络。
AI.result: 在长序列和乱序任务序列上，MADE-IT在准确率和鲁棒性上持续优于强基线，同时显著剪枝冗余专家（尤其在通用模块和浅层网络中）。
AI.conclusion: MADE-IT通过流形几何指导的专家动态演化与隐式路由，有效解决了持续模型融合中的核心矛盾，实现了性能与效率的双赢。

title: Representational Harms in LLM-Generated Narratives Against Global Majority Nationalities
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for text generation tasks from everyday use to high-stakes enterprise and government applications, including simulated interviews with asylum seekers. While many works highlight the new potential applications of LLMs, there are risks of LLMs encoding and perpetuating harmful biases about non-dominant communities across the globe. To better evaluate and mitigate such harms, more research examining how LLMs portray diverse individuals is needed. In this work, we study how national origin identities are portrayed by widely-adopted LLMs in response to open-ended narrative generation prompts. Our findings demonstrate the presence of persistent representational harms by national origin, including harmful stereotypes, erasure, and one-dimensional portrayals of Global Majority identities. Minoritized national identities are simultaneously underrepresented in power-neutral stories and overrepresented in subordinated character portrayals, which are over fifty times more likely to appear than dominant portrayals. The degree of harm is amplified when US nationality cues (e.g., ``American'') are present in input prompts. Notably, we find that the harms we identify cannot be explained away via sycophancy, as US-centric biases persist even when replacing US nationality cues with non-US national identities in the prompts. Based on our findings, we call for further exploration of cultural harms in LLMs through methodologies that center Global Majority perspectives and challenge the uncritical adoption of US-based LLMs for the classification, surveillance, and misrepresentation of the majority of our planet.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型在开放叙事生成中如何描绘不同国籍身份，发现模型存在持久的表现性伤害，包括有害刻板印象、抹除和对全球多数群体的一维描绘，且美国中心偏见无法被归因于谄媚效应。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs被广泛应用于高风险场景（如庇护申请模拟面试），但其可能编码并传播对非主导群体的有害偏见。现有研究缺乏对LLM如何描绘不同国籍身份的深入分析，尤其是对全球多数群体（Global Majority）的多维伤害评估。
AI.method: 对广泛采用的LLMs输入开放式叙事生成提示，系统性地分析输出中国籍身份的表现模式。通过对照实验设计，比较包含/不包含美国国籍线索的提示，并测试替换提示中美国国籍为非美国国籍后的效果，以排除谄媚效应（sycophancy）的解释。
AI.result: 1）少数群体国籍在权力中立的故事中被低估，在从属角色描绘中被过度代表（出现概率超过主导描绘的50倍）；2）美国国籍线索的存在会放大伤害程度；3）即使将提示中的美国国籍替换为非美国国籍，美国中心偏见依然存在，说明伤害无法被谄媚效应解释。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁通过以全球多数群体视角为中心的方法论，进一步探索LLMs中的文化伤害，并反对不加批判地将美国为中心的LLMs用于对地球上大多数人的分类、监视和错误表述。

title: ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition
comment: Accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026
summary: Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition (LRLPR) remains a challenging problem in real-world surveillance scenarios, where long capture distances, compression artifacts, and adverse imaging conditions can severely degrade license plate legibility. To promote progress in this area, we organized the ICPR 2026 Competition on Low-Resolution License Plate Recognition, the first competition specifically dedicated to LRLPR using real low-quality data collected under operationally relevant conditions. The competition was based on the LRLPR-26 dataset, which comprises 20,000 training tracks and 3,000 test tracks; each training track contains five low-resolution and five high-resolution images of the same license plate. Notably, a total of 269 teams from 41 countries registered for the competition, and 99 teams submitted valid entries in the Blind Test Phase. The winning team achieved a Recognition Rate of 82.13%, and four teams surpassed the 80% mark, highlighting both the high level of competition at the top of the leaderboard and the continued difficulty of the task. In addition to presenting the competition design, evaluation protocol, and main results, this paper summarizes the methods adopted by the top-5 teams and discusses current trends and promising directions for future research on LRLPR. The competition webpage is available at https://icpr26lrlpr.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ICPR 2026低分辨率车牌识别竞赛，基于LRLPR-26数据集（含20,000训练轨迹和3,000测试轨迹），共269支队伍参赛，最佳识别率达82.13%，并总结了前五名方法及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现实监控场景中，远距离拍摄、压缩伪影和恶劣成像条件导致车牌图像分辨率低，识别困难。现有研究缺乏专门针对真实低质量数据的竞赛，因此组织本次竞赛以推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建LRLPR-26数据集，每个训练轨迹包含5张低分辨率和5张高分辨率图像；设计竞赛流程（包括盲测阶段）；制定评估协议；收集并分析参赛队伍（特别是前五名）的方法。
AI.result: 269支队伍（来自41个国家）注册，99支提交有效结果；冠军识别率82.13%，4支队伍超过80%；表明任务难度大但顶尖水平竞争激烈。
AI.conclusion: 低分辨率车牌识别仍具挑战性；竞赛成功吸引了国际关注；总结了当前有效方法，并指出了未来研究方向。

title: Deep Learning for Model Calibration in Simulation of Itaconic Acid Production
summary: In this study, deep learning is used to estimate kinetic parameters for modeling itaconic acid production based on real batch experiments conducted at different agitation speeds and reactor scales. Two deep learning strategies, namely direct deep learning (DDL) and generative conditional flow matching (CFM) are compared and benchmarked against nonlinear regression as a reference method. Compared with DDL, CFM consistently yields more accurate results. The concentration profiles predicted by CFM closely match those obtained from nonlinear regression, whereas DDL results in larger deviations. Similar behavior is observed in the scale-up experiments, where the CFM model again generalizes better and is more robust than the direct approach. These findings demonstrate that CFM can reliably predict system behavior across different operating conditions and scales, offering a flexible and data-efficient framework for parameter estimation in dynamic bioprocess models.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习估算衣康酸生产中的动力学参数，比较了直接深度学习（DDL）和条件流匹配（CFM）两种策略。结果表明，CFM在准确性和泛化能力上优于DDL，能可靠预测不同操作条件和规模下的系统行为。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性回归方法在动态生物过程建模中参数估计困难，亟需更灵活、数据高效的方法来预测不同操作条件和规模下的系统行为。
AI.method: 采用两种深度学习策略（直接深度学习DDL和生成式条件流匹配CFM）估算动力学参数，并以非线性回归作为基准方法进行比较。实验基于不同搅拌速度和反应器规模的真实批次数据。
AI.result: CFM比DDL更准确，浓度预测与非线性回归结果高度吻合；DDL偏差较大。在放大实验中，CFM的泛化能力和鲁棒性均优于DDL。
AI.conclusion: CFM能够可靠预测不同操作条件和规模下的系统行为，是一种灵活且数据高效的动态生物过程模型参数估计方法。

title: Railway Artificial Intelligence Learning Benchmark (RAIL-BENCH): A Benchmark Suite for Perception in the Railway Domain
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables, submitted at 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems
summary: Automated train operation on existing railway infrastructure requires robust camera-based perception, yet the railway domain lacks public benchmark suites with standardized evaluation protocols that would enable reproducible comparison of approaches. We present RAIL-BENCH, the first perception benchmark suite for the railway domain. It comprises five challenges - rail track detection, object detection, vegetation segmentation, multi-object tracking, and monocular visual odometry - each tailored to the specific characteristics of railway environments. RAIL-BENCH provides curated training and test datasets drawn from diverse real-world scenarios, evaluation metrics, and public scoreboards (https://www.mrt.kit.edu/railbench). For the rail track detection challenge we introduce LineAP, a novel segment-based average precision metric that evaluates the geometric accuracy of polyline predictions independently of instance-level grouping, addressing key limitations of existing line detection metrics.

AI.tldr: RAIL-BENCH是首个专为铁路领域设计的感知基准套件，涵盖轨道检测、目标检测、植被分割、多目标跟踪和单目视觉里程计五项挑战，并提出了新的线段平均精度指标LineAP用于轨道检测评估。
AI.motivation: 铁路领域缺乏公开、标准化的基准测试套件和评估协议，难以实现不同方法之间的可重复比较，现有研究无法系统评估铁路环境下的感知算法性能。
AI.method: 构建了RAIL-BENCH基准套件，包含五个针对铁路环境定制的挑战任务、从真实场景中收集的标注训练/测试数据集、标准化评估指标以及公开排行榜；同时提出了LineAP指标，用于评估折线预测的几何精度。
AI.result: 成功建立了铁路领域首个感知基准套件，提供了标准化的评估平台和数据集，并提出了LineAP这一新的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: RAIL-BENCH填补了铁路领域感知基准的空白，通过标准化评估协议和多任务挑战，有望推动铁路自动化感知技术的可重复研究与对比。

title: Decoding High-Dimensional Finger Motion from EMG Using Riemannian Features and RNNs
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables, links to a GitHub, a dataset on Zenodo, and two videos on YouTube
summary: Continuous estimation of high-dimensional finger kinematics from forearm surface electromyography (EMG) could enable natural control for hand prostheses, AR/XR interfaces, and teleoperation. However, the complexity of human hand gestures and the entanglement of forearm muscles make accurate recognition intrinsically challenging. Existing approaches typically reduce task complexity by relying on classification-based machine learning, limiting the controllable degrees of freedom and compromising on natural interaction. We present an end-to-end framework for continuous EMG-to-kinematics regression using only consumer-grade hardware. The framework combines an 8-channel EMG armband, a single webcam, and an automatic synchronization procedure, enabling the collection of the EMG Finger-Kinematics dataset (EMG-FK), a 10-h dataset of synchronized EMG and 15 finger joint angles from 20 participants performing rich, unconstrained right-hand motions. We also introduce the Temporal Riemannian Regressor (TRR), a lightweight GRU-based model that uses sequences of multi-band Riemannian covariance features to decode finger motion. Across EMG-FK and the public emg2pose benchmark, TRR outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both intra- and cross-subject evaluation. On EMG-FK, it reaches an average absolute error of $9.79 °\pm 1.48$ in intra-subject and $16.71 °\pm 3.97$ in cross-subject. Finally, we demonstrate real-time deployment on a Raspberry Pi 5 and intuitive control of a robotic hand; TRR runs at nearly 10 predictions/s and is roughly an order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art approaches. Together, these contributions lower the barrier to reproducible, real-time EMG-based decoding of high-dimensional finger motion, and pave the way toward more natural and intuitive control of embedded EMG-based systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个端到端的EMG-to-kinematics回归框架，结合8通道EMG臂环、单摄像头和自动同步流程，构建了EMG-FK数据集（10小时，20名参与者的15个手指关节角度），并设计了Temporal Riemannian Regressor (TRR)模型。TRR利用多频段黎曼协方差特征的GRU网络，在EMG-FK和emg2pose基准上均优于现有方法，实现了实时部署（Raspberry Pi 5上约10预测/秒），为高维手指运动解码提供了低门槛、实时的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖分类式机器学习，限制了可控自由度且牺牲了自然交互。本文旨在实现高维手指运动学从前臂表面EMG信号的连续估计，以支持更自然的假手控制、AR/XR交互和遥操作。
AI.method: 1) 构建EMG-FK数据集：使用8通道EMG臂环+单摄像头+自动同步流程采集20名参与者10小时数据，包含15个手指关节角度。2) 提出Temporal Riemannian Regressor (TRR)：基于GRU的轻量级模型，利用多频段黎曼协方差特征解码手指运动。
AI.result: 在EMG-FK上，TRR在受试者内评估中达到9.79°±1.47的平均绝对误差，在跨受试者评估中达到16.71°±3.97。在Raspberry Pi 5上实现约10次预测/秒的实时部署，速度比现有方法快约一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 本文降低了可复现、实时的EMG高维手指运动解码的门槛，为基于EMG的嵌入式系统实现更自然直观的控制铺平了道路。

title: Different Strokes for Different Folks: Writer Identification for Historical Arabic Manuscripts
summary: Handwritten Arabic manuscripts preserve the Arab world's intellectual and cultural heritage, and writer identification supports provenance, authenticity verification, and historical analysis. Using the Muharaf dataset of historical Arabic manuscripts, we evaluate writer identification from individual line images and, to the best of our knowledge, provide the first baselines reported under both line-level and page-disjoint evaluation protocols. Since the dataset is only partially labeled for writer identification, we manually verified and expanded writer labels in the public portion from 6,858 (28.00%) to 21,249 lines (86.75%) out of 24,495 line images, correcting inconsistencies and removing non-handwritten text. After further filtering, we retained 18,987 lines (77.51%). We propose a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based model with attention mechanisms for closed-set writer identification, including rare two-writer lines modeled as composite writer-pair classes. We benchmark fourteen configurations and conduct ablations across different feature extractors and training regimes. To assess generalization to unseen pages, the page-disjoint protocol assigns all lines from each page to a single split. Under the line-level protocol, a fine-tuned DenseNet201 with attention achieves 99.05% Top-1 accuracy, 99.73% Top-5 accuracy, and 97.44% F1-score. Under the more challenging page-disjoint protocol, the best observed results are 78.61% Top-1 accuracy, 87.79% Top-5 accuracy, and 66.55% F1-score, thus quantifying the impact of page-level cues. By expanding the Muharaf dataset's labeled subset and reporting both protocols, we provide a clearer benchmark and a practical resource for historians and linguists engaged with culturally and historically significant documents. The code and implementation details are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文基于Muharaf历史阿拉伯语手稿数据集，手工扩展了作者标签（从28%增至86.75%），提出了一种带注意力机制的CNN模型用于封闭集作者识别，在行级协议下达到99.05% Top-1准确率，在页面分离协议下达到78.61% Top-1准确率，并量化了页面级线索的影响。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语手稿承载着重要的文化和历史价值，作者识别对于来源鉴定、真实性验证和历史分析至关重要。然而，现有工作缺乏对历史阿拉伯语手稿数据集在标准化评估协议下的基准结果。
AI.method: 手动扩展Muharaf数据集的作者标签（从6,858行扩展到21,249行），过滤非手写文本和噪声后保留18,987行；提出基于CNN（DenseNet201）加注意力机制的封闭集作者识别模型；将罕见的双作者行建模为复合作者-配对类别；在行级和页面分离两种协议下进行14种配置的基准测试和消融实验。
AI.result: 行级协议：微调DenseNet201加注意力机制达到99.05% Top-1、99.73% Top-5准确率和97.44% F1-score。页面分离协议：最佳结果为78.61% Top-1、87.79% Top-5准确率和66.55% F1-score，量化了页面级线索的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展标签和建立两种评估协议下的基准，为历史阿拉伯语手稿的作者识别提供了更清晰的评估标准和实用资源，对历史学家和语言学家具有实际参考价值。

title: FeatEHR-LLM: Leveraging Large Language Models for Feature Engineering in Electronic Health Records
summary: Feature engineering for Electronic Health Records (EHR) is complicated by irregular observation intervals, variable measurement frequencies, and structural sparsity inherent to clinical time series. Existing automated methods either lack clinical domain awareness or assume clean, regularly sampled inputs, limiting their applicability to real-world EHR data. We present \textbf{FeatEHR-LLM}, a framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate clinically meaningful tabular features from irregularly sampled EHR time series. To limit patient privacy exposure, the LLM operates exclusively on dataset schemas and task descriptions rather than raw patient records. A tool-augmented generation mechanism equips the LLM with specialized routines for querying irregular temporal data, enabling it to produce executable feature-extraction code that explicitly handles uneven observation patterns and informative sparsity. FeatEHR-LLM supports both univariate and multivariate feature generation through an iterative, validation-in-the-loop pipeline. Evaluated on eight clinical prediction tasks across four ICU datasets, our framework achieves the highest mean AUROC on 7 out of 8 tasks, with improvements of up to 6 percentage points over strong baselines. Code is available at github.com/hojjatkarami/FeatEHR-LLM.

AI.tldr: FeatEHR-LLM利用大语言模型基于数据集模式生成可执行的特征提取代码，在不访问原始患者数据的情况下处理不规则采样的电子健康记录时序数据，在8个临床预测任务中7个达到最高AUROC。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录的特征工程面临不规则观测间隔、可变测量频率和结构性稀疏等挑战，现有自动化方法要么缺乏临床领域知识，要么假设输入数据规则采样，难以适用于真实世界的非规则EHR数据。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型(LLM)仅基于数据集模式和任务描述（而非原始患者记录）生成临床有意义的表格特征；通过工具增强生成机制，为LLM配备专门处理不规则时序数据的查询例程；采用迭代验证循环的流程，支持单变量和多变量特征生成。
AI.result: 在4个ICU数据集的8项临床预测任务中，FeatEHR-LLM在7项任务上取得最高的平均AUROC，相比强基线最高提升6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: FeatEHR-LLM有效解决了不规则EHR时序数据的特征工程难题，在不暴露患者隐私的前提下利用LLM的临床知识生成可解释、可执行的特征提取代码，显著提升了临床预测性能。

title: Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus for Prohibitively Large Datasets
summary: We introduce NONSAC (Non-Minimal Sampling and Consensus), a general framework for robust and scalable model estimation from arbitrarily large datasets contaminated with noise and outliers. NONSAC repeatedly samples non-minimal subsets of data and generates model hypotheses using a robust estimator, producing multiple candidate models. The final model is selected based on a predefined scoring rule that evaluates hypothesis quality. Our framework is estimator-agnostic and can be integrated with existing geometric fitting algorithms such as RANSAC to improve both scalability and robustness to outliers. We propose and evaluate various scoring rules for NONSAC on relative camera pose estimation, Perspective-n-Point, and point cloud registration. Furthermore, we showcase the applicability of NONSAC to correspondence-free point cloud registration by hypothesizing all-to-all correspondences.

AI.tldr: NONSAC是一个通用的鲁棒模型估计框架，通过重复采样非最小子集并利用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，最终基于评分规则选择最优模型，可集成RANSAC等算法提升可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒估计方法（如RANSAC）在处理大规模噪声和离群点数据时，可扩展性和鲁棒性不足，需要一种更通用的框架来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: NONSAC框架重复采样非最小数据子集，使用鲁棒估计器生成多个候选模型，然后基于预定义的评分规则选择最终模型。该框架与估计器无关，可集成到RANSAC等现有几何拟合算法中。
AI.result: 在相对相机位姿估计、PnP和点云配准任务上评估了多种评分规则；展示了NONSAC在全对全对应假设下的无对应点云配准中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: NONSAC是一种估计器无关的通用框架，能够显著提升现有几何拟合算法在大规模噪声数据上的可扩展性和鲁棒性，并在多种视觉任务中展现有效性和通用性。

title: An Integrated Framework for Explainable, Fair, and Observable Hospital Readmission Prediction: Development and Validation on MIMIC-IV
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to the Journal of the American Medical Informatics Association (JAMIA), currently under review
summary:
Objective: To propose and retrospectively validate an integrated framework addressing three barriers to clinical translation of readmission prediction: lack of explainability, absence of deployment reliability infrastructure, and inadequate demographic fairness evaluation.
  Materials and Methods: We constructed a cohort of 415231 adult admissions from the MIMIC-IV database (30-day readmission prevalence 18.0%), split 70/15/15. Logistic regression, XGBoost, and LightGBM models were trained on 26 features. SHAP provided per-patient explanations. Fairness was evaluated across 16 subgroups using AUC-ROC, false negative rate (FNR), and positive predictive value (PPV). Calibration was assessed using Brier scores and calibration curves.
  Results: XGBoost achieved AUC-ROC 0.696 (95% CI 0.691-0.701), outperforming or matching the LACE baseline (AUC 0.60-0.68). LightGBM achieved best calibration (Brier 0.146). Prior admissions were the dominant predictor. All subgroups met equity thresholds (delta AUC <= 0.05, delta FNR <= 0.10).
  Conclusion: This framework delivers competitive performance, clinically actionable explanations, and strong demographic equity. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/Tomisin92/readmission-prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一个集成框架，解决临床转译读入院预测的三大障碍：缺乏可解释性、缺乏部署可靠性基础设施、以及人口统计学公平性评估不足。基于MIMIC-IV数据库41.5万成人入院记录，使用逻辑回归、XGBoost和LightGBM模型，XGBoost达到AUC-ROC 0.696，所有亚组均满足公平性阈值。
AI.motivation: 现有读入院预测模型在临床部署中面临三个主要障碍：模型不可解释（黑箱问题）、缺乏可靠的部署基础设施、以及对不同人口统计学亚群的公平性评估不足。本文旨在构建一个同时解决这三个问题的集成框架，推动模型从研究走向临床实际应用。
AI.method: 使用MIMIC-IV数据库构建415231例成人入院队列（30天再入院率18.0%），按70/15/15划分训练/验证/测试集。训练逻辑回归、XGBoost和LightGBM三种模型，使用26个特征。采用SHAP提供个体层面的可解释性，在16个亚组中使用AUC-ROC、假阴性率（FNR）和阳性预测值（PPV）评估公平性，用Brier分数和校准曲线评估校准度。
AI.result: XGBoost达到AUC-ROC 0.696（95% CI 0.691-0.701），优于或匹敌LACE基线（AUC 0.60-0.68）。LightGBM校准度最佳（Brier 0.146）。既往入院次数是最主要的预测因子。所有亚组均满足公平性阈值（delta AUC <= 0.05, delta FNR <= 0.10）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在性能、临床可解释解释性和人口统计公平性方面均表现良好，代码已开源，为临床读入院预测的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Distilling Vision Transformers for Distortion-Robust Representation Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning has achieved remarkable success in learning visual representations from clean data, yet remains challenging when clean observations are sparse or not available at all. In this paper, we demonstrate that pretrained vision models can be leveraged to learn distortion-robust representations, which can then be effectively applied to downstream tasks operating on distorted observations. In particular, we propose an asymmetric knowledge distillation framework in which both teacher and student are initialized from the same pretrained Vision Transformer but receive different views of each image: the teacher processes clean images, while the student sees their distorted versions. We introduce multi-level distillation that aligns global embeddings, patch-level features, and attention maps and show that the student is able to approximate clean-image representations despite never directly accessing clean data. We evaluate our approach on image classification tasks across several datasets and under various distortions, consistently outperforming existing alternatives for the same amount of human supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对称知识蒸馏框架，利用预训练视觉模型从失真图像中学习鲁棒表征，学生模型仅通过失真图像即可近似教师模型从干净图像中提取的表征，在多种失真场景的分类任务中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习在干净数据上表现优异，但现实场景中干净观测数据稀疏或不可获取，亟需一种能从失真/损坏数据中学习鲁棒视觉表征的方法。
AI.method: 提出非对称知识蒸馏框架：教师和学生均初始化为预训练Vision Transformer，教师处理干净图像，学生处理失真图像；引入多层级蒸馏（全局嵌入、patch级特征、注意力图对齐），使学生无需直接接触干净数据即可近似干净图像表征。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和多种失真类型（噪声、模糊、遮挡等）的图像分类任务中，所提方法一致优于同等监督水平下的现有替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 预训练视觉模型可通过非对称知识蒸馏有效迁移到失真数据场景，多层级对齐策略是关键；该方法为在缺乏干净数据时学习鲁棒表征提供了有效途径。

title: On the Properties of Feature Attribution for Supervised Contrastive Learning
summary: Most Neural Networks (NNs) for classification are trained using Cross-Entropy as a loss function. This approach requires the model to have an explicit classification layer. However, there exist alternative approaches, such as Contrastive Learning (CL). Instead of explicitly operating a classification, CL has the NN produce an embedding space where projections of similar data are pulled together, while projections of dissimilar data are pushed apart. In the case of Supervised CL (SCL), labels are adopted as similarity criteria, thus creating an embedding space where the projected data points are well-clustered. SCL provides crucial advantages over CE with regard to adversarial robustness and out-of-distribution detection, thus making it a more natural choice in safety-critical scenarios. In the present paper, we empirically show that NNs for image classification trained with SCL present higher-quality feature attribution explanations than CL with regard to faithfulness, complexity, and continuity. These results reinforce previous findings about CL-based approaches when targeting more trustworthy and transparent NNs and can guide practitioners in the selection of training objectives targeting not only accuracy, but also transparency of the models.

AI.tldr: 本文实证证明，使用监督对比学习（SCL）训练的神经网络在特征归因可解释性方面（忠实性、复杂性和连续性）优于使用交叉熵（CE）训练的网络，为追求更透明、可信的模型提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失函数在安全关键场景中存在对抗鲁棒性和分布外检测方面的不足，而监督对比学习虽在这些方面表现更优，但其对模型可解释性的影响尚未被充分研究。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过实证研究，对比使用监督对比学习（SCL）和交叉熵（CE）训练的神经网络，在图像分类任务上评估特征归因解释的质量，考察忠实性、复杂性和连续性三个维度。
AI.result: 监督对比学习（SCL）训练的网络在特征归因解释的忠实性、复杂性和连续性三个指标上均优于交叉熵（CE）训练的网络。
AI.conclusion: 监督对比学习不仅能提升模型的对抗鲁棒性和分布外检测能力，还能产生更高质量的特征归因解释，使其成为追求模型透明度和可信任度的更优训练目标选择。

title: Evolving Thematic Map Design in Academic Cartography: A Thirty-Year Study Based on Multilingual Journals
summary: Thematic maps play a central role in academic communication, yet their large-scale design evolution has rarely been examined empirically. This study presents a longitudinal and multilingual analysis of thematic map design practices in academic cartography from 1990 to 2020. We compile a corpus of 45,732 research articles from sixteen authoritative Chinese- and English-language journals and extract 23,928 maps using computer vision and large-model-based document parsing to build a structured dataset. Map design characteristics are quantified across three dimensions: map elements, color design, and layout structure. Results show that Chinese- and Englishlanguage academic maps share highly similar structural conventions, typically employing restrained color palettes with neutral dominant hues, low saturation, high brightness, and limited hue diversity, as well as centered layouts with high main-map occupation ratios. Differences exist in that English-language maps show slightly greater hue richness and compactness, whereas Chinese-language maps historically rely more on neutral hues and integrated layouts. Temporal analysis reveals parallel evolutionary trends in both groups, including increasing element richness, legend usage, and hue diversity, alongside stable layout structures. Overall, the findings suggest that academic map design evolution is characterized more by institutional convergence than cultural divergence.

AI.tldr: 本文基于1990-2020年间中英文期刊的45,732篇学术论文，提取23,928幅专题地图，分析其设计特征在三个维度（地图元素、色彩设计、布局结构）上的演变。研究发现中英文学术地图在结构上高度相似，均偏向中性、低饱和、高亮度配色和居中布局，但英文地图色彩丰富度略高，中文地图更依赖中性色和整合布局。时间趋势显示两者并行进化：元素丰富度、图例使用和色彩多样性增加，布局结构稳定。总体而言，学术地图设计演变呈现制度趋同而非文化分化。
AI.motivation: 专题地图在学术交流中至关重要，但大规模的设计演变缺乏实证研究。本文试图填补这一空白，系统考察中英文学术地图设计实践的演变规律。
AI.method: 汇编1990-2020年间16种中英文学术期刊的45,732篇文章，利用计算机视觉和大模型文档解析方法提取23,928幅地图，从地图元素、色彩设计、布局结构三个维度量化分析设计特征。
AI.result: 中英文学术地图结构高度相似：配色中性、低饱和、高明度、色彩种类有限；布局居中、主图占比高。差异在于英文地图色彩丰富度略高、布局更紧凑；中文地图更依赖中性色和整合布局。时间上两者均呈现元素丰富度、图例使用和色彩多样性增长的趋势，布局结构稳定。
AI.conclusion: 学术地图设计演变更多体现制度趋同而非文化分化，中英文期刊在地图设计规范上的共同规范主导了其演化方向。

title: SOLAR-RL: Semi-Online Long-horizon Assignment Reinforcement Learning
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: As Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mature, GUI agents are evolving from static interactions to complex navigation. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training MLLM agents on dynamic GUI tasks, its effective application faces a dilemma. Standard Offline RL often relies on static step-level data, neglecting global trajectory semantics such as task completion and execution quality. Conversely, Online RL captures the long-term dynamics but suffers from high interaction costs and potential environmental instability. To bridge this gap, we propose SOLAR-RL (Semi-Online Long-horizon Assignment Reinforcement Learning). Instead of relying solely on expensive online interactions, our framework integrates global trajectory insights directly into the offline learning process. Specifically, we reconstruct diverse rollout candidates from static data, detect the first failure point using per-step validity signals, and retroactively assign dense step-level rewards with target-aligned shaping to reflect trajectory-level execution quality, effectively simulating online feedback without interaction costs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SOLAR-RL significantly improves long-horizon task completion rates and robustness compared to strong baselines, offering a sample-efficient solution for autonomous GUI navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出SOLAR-RL框架，通过从静态数据中重构轨迹、检测首次失败点并分配密集步骤级奖励，在无需在线交互的情况下模拟在线反馈，有效提升了GUI智能体的长程任务完成率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在GUI智能体训练中面临两难：离线RL依赖静态步骤级数据，忽略全局轨迹语义（如任务完成度、执行质量）；在线RL虽能捕捉长期动态，但交互成本高且环境不稳定。作者希望弥合这一差距。
AI.method: SOLAR-RL框架包含三个关键步骤：1) 从静态数据中重建多样化rollout候选项；2) 利用逐步骤有效性信号检测首次失败点；3) 结合目标对齐的奖励塑形，反向分配稠密的步骤级奖励，以反映轨迹级执行质量，从而在不产生交互成本的情况下模拟在线反馈。
AI.result: 实验表明，SOLAR-RL在长程任务完成率和鲁棒性上显著优于强基线方法，是一种样本高效的自主GUI导航解决方案。
AI.conclusion: SOLAR-RL通过半在线长程分配强化学习，成功将全局轨迹信息融入离线学习过程，有效解决了离线RL忽视全局语义与在线RL成本过高之间的矛盾，为GUI智能体训练提供了新的高效范式。

title: ReLIC-SGG: Relation Lattice Completion for Open-Vocabulary Scene Graph Generation
summary: Open-vocabulary scene graph generation (SGG) aims to describe visual scenes with flexible relation phrases beyond a fixed predicate set. Existing methods usually treat annotated triplets as positives and all unannotated object-pair relations as negatives. However, scene graph annotations are inherently incomplete: many valid relations are missing, and the same interaction can be described at different granularities, e.g., \textit{on}, \textit{standing on}, \textit{resting on}, and \textit{supported by}. This issue becomes more severe in open-vocabulary SGG due to the much larger relation space. We propose \textbf{ReLIC-SGG}, a relation-incompleteness-aware framework that treats unannotated relations as latent variables rather than definite negatives. ReLIC-SGG builds a semantic relation lattice to model similarity, entailment, and contradiction among open-vocabulary predicates, and uses it to infer missing positive relations from visual-language compatibility, graph context, and semantic consistency. A positive-unlabeled graph learning objective further reduces false-negative supervision, while lattice-guided decoding produces compact and semantically consistent scene graphs. Experiments on conventional, open-vocabulary, and panoptic SGG benchmarks show that ReLIC-SGG improves rare and unseen predicate recognition and better recovers missing relations.

AI.tldr: 提出ReLIC-SGG框架，通过将未标注关系视为潜在变量而非明确负例、构建语义关系格来建模谓词之间的相似/蕴含/矛盾关系，以及引入正-无图学习目标，解决了开放词汇场景图生成中标注不完整导致的大量假阴性问题。
AI.motivation: 场景图标注天然不完整：许多有效关系缺失，同一交互可以不同粒度描述（如on/standing on/resting on/supported by）。开放词汇场景图生成的关系空间更大，这一问题更严重。现有方法将未标注关系一律视为负例，导致大量假阴性监督信号。
AI.method: 1) 构建语义关系格（semantic relation lattice），建模开放词汇谓词间的相似、蕴含和矛盾关系；2) 将未标注关系作为潜在变量，通过视觉-语言兼容性、图上下文和语义一致性推断缺失的正关系；3) 采用正-无图学习（positive-unlabeled graph learning）目标减少假阴性监督；4) 格引导解码生成紧凑且语义一致的场景图。
AI.result: 在常规、开放词汇和全景场景图生成基准上，ReLIC-SGG提升了罕见和未见谓词的识别能力，并更好地恢复了缺失的关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模关系标注的不完整性，将未标注关系视为不确定而非负例，能有效缓解开放词汇SGG中的假阴性问题，提升模型对稀有和未见关系的泛化能力。

title: Data-Free Contribution Estimation in Federated Learning using Gradient von Neumann Entropy
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 4 pages Appendix, 6 figures in Appendix. To appear in CVPR 2026 FedVision Workshop
summary: Client contribution estimation in Federated Learning is necessary for identifying clients' importance and for providing fair rewards. Current methods often rely on server-side validation data or self-reported client information, which can compromise privacy or be susceptible to manipulation. We introduce a data-free signal based on the matrix von Neumann (spectral) entropy of the final-layer updates, which measures the diversity of the information contributed. We instantiate two practical schemes: (i) SpectralFed, which uses normalized entropy as aggregation weights, and (ii) SpectralFuse, which fuses entropy with class-specific alignment via a rank-adaptive Kalman filter for per-round stability. Across CIFAR-10/100 and the naturally partitioned FEMNIST and FedISIC benchmarks, entropy-derived scores show a consistently high correlation with standalone client accuracy under diverse non-IID regimes - without validation data or client metadata. We compare our results with data-free contribution estimation baselines and show that spectral entropy serves as a useful indicator of client contribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于矩阵谱熵的无数据客户端贡献估计方法，通过最后一层更新的熵值衡量信息多样性，设计了SpectralFed（归一化熵作聚合权重）和SpectralFuse（熵+类对齐+卡尔曼滤波）两种方案，在多个非IID基准上验证了与客户端准确率的高相关性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中需要评估客户端贡献以进行公平奖励，但现有方法依赖服务端验证数据或客户端自报信息，存在隐私泄露或易被操纵的问题。
AI.method: 利用最后一层更新的矩阵冯·诺依曼（谱）熵作为无数据信号衡量信息多样性，提出两种方案：(i) SpectralFed——归一化熵作为聚合权重；(ii) SpectralFuse——融合熵与类别对齐，通过秩自适应卡尔曼滤波实现每轮稳定性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、FEMNIST和FedISIC基准上，熵得分与客户端独立准确率在多种非IID场景下保持高相关性，优于现有无数据贡献估计基线。
AI.conclusion: 谱熵可作为客户端贡献的有效无数据指标，无需验证数据或客户端元数据，兼顾隐私与鲁棒性。

title: Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Pedestrian Detection Models
summary: Physical adversarial patch attacks critically threaten pedestrian detection, causing surveillance and autonomous driving systems to miss pedestrians and creating severe safety risks. Despite their effectiveness in controlled settings, existing physical attacks face two major limitations in practice: they lack systematic disruption of the multi-stage decision pipeline, enabling residual modules to offset perturbations, and they fail to model complex physical variations, leading to poor robustness. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel pedestrian adversarial patch generation method that combines multi-stage collaborative attacks with robustness enhancement under physical diversity, called TriPatch. Specifically, we design a triplet loss consisting of detection confidence suppression, bounding-box offset amplification, and non-maximum suppression (NMS) disruption, which jointly act across different stages of the detection pipeline. In addition, we introduce an appearance consistency loss to constrain the color distribution of the patch, thereby improving its adaptability under diverse imaging conditions, and incorporate data augmentation to further enhance robustness against complex physical perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TriPatch achieves a higher attack success rate across multiple detector models compared to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriPatch，一种结合多阶段协同攻击与物理多样性鲁棒性增强的行人对抗补丁生成方法，通过三重损失（检测置信度抑制、边界框偏移放大、NMS破坏）和外观一致性损失，在多个检测器上实现更高攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗攻击存在两大局限：缺乏对多阶段检测管道的系统性破坏（残差模块可抵消扰动），以及未建模复杂物理变化导致鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 设计三重损失（检测置信度抑制+边界框偏移放大+NMS破坏）实现多阶段协同攻击；引入外观一致性损失约束补丁颜色分布，结合数据增强提升物理鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个检测器模型上，TriPatch相比现有方法取得了更高的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: TriPatch有效解决了现有物理对抗攻击缺乏多阶段系统性破坏和物理鲁棒性不足的问题，为行人检测安全提供了更强的攻击评估方法。

title: SpikingBrain2.0: Brain-Inspired Foundation Models for Efficient Long-Context and Cross-Platform Inference
summary:
Scaling context length is reshaping large-model development, yet full-attention Transformers suffer from prohibitive computation and inference bottlenecks at long sequences. A key challenge is to design foundation models that maintain performance and long-context efficiency with minimal training overhead. We introduce SpikingBrain2.0 (SpB2.0), a 5B model that advances both architecture and training efficiency of its predecessor.
  Our contributions are two-fold. (1) Architectural Innovation: We propose Dual-Space Sparse Attention (DSSA), an inter-layer hybrid of Sparse Softmax Attention (MoBA) and Sparse Linear Attention (SSE), achieving an improved performance-efficiency trade-off for long-context modeling. SpB2.0 further supports dual quantization paths: INT8-Spiking coding enables sparse event-driven computation, while FP8 coding accelerates inference on modern GPUs. (2) Enhanced Training Strategy: We develop an optimized Transformer-to-Hybrid (T2H) pipeline with dual conversion paths for LLMs and VLMs using curated open-source data.
  Empirically, SpB2.0-5B and SpB2.0-VL-5B recover most of the base Transformer (Qwen3-4B) capability with under 7k A100 GPU hours. SpB2.0 achieves a 10.13x TTFT speedup at 4M context and supports over 10M tokens on 8 A100 GPUs under vLLM, where full-attention models exceed memory limits. It also demonstrates strong cross-platform compatibility, enabling FP8 GPU inference (2.52x speedup at 250k) and efficient neuromorphic execution (64.31% sparsity, with 70.6% and 46.5% area and power reduction at 500MHz).
  Overall, SpikingBrain2.0 provides a practical pathway for lightweight, multimodal, spiking foundation models, highlighting the potential of combining brain-inspired mechanisms with efficient architectures for resource-constrained and edge scenarios.

AI.tldr: SpikingBrain2.0 (SpB2.0) 是一个5B参数规模的长上下文脉冲神经网络模型，通过双空间稀疏注意力架构和优化训练策略，在保持性能的同时实现超长序列高效推理，支持超千万token处理，并在FP8 GPU和神经形态硬件上均有显著加速。
AI.motivation: 长上下文全注意力Transformer面临计算和推理瓶颈，亟需设计既能保持性能又能在低训练开销下实现长上下文高效处理的基座模型。
AI.method: 提出双空间稀疏注意力（DSSA），混合稀疏Softmax注意力（MoBA）和稀疏线性注意力（SSE）；支持INT8脉冲编码（事件驱动）和FP8编码（GPU加速）双量化路径；开发优化后的Transformer-to-Hybrid (T2H)训练流水线，支持LLM和VLM双转换路径。
AI.result: SpB2.0-5B在不到7k A100 GPU小时的训练下恢复了Qwen3-4B基座Transformer的大部分能力；4M上下文时TTFT加速10.13倍；8张A100上支持超1000万token（全注意力模型内存溢出）；FP8推理在250k上下文时加速2.52倍；神经形态执行稀疏度64.31%，功耗降低46.5%。
AI.conclusion: SpikingBrain2.0为轻量级、多模态脉冲基座模型提供了实用路径，展示了脑启发机制与高效架构结合在资源受限和边缘场景中的潜力。

title: Video Analysis and Generation via a Semantic Progress Function
